title: Affordable housing-reforms municipal responsibilities concerning provision;$16M

title: Disability Savings Act-concerns tax deductions for certain disability expenses

title: Veterans, disabled-provides credits under CBT and income tax for qualified wages

summary: Requires establishment of central database of State programs on official website.

title: Classroom supply purch.-allow income tax deduction up to $1200, unreimb expenses

summary: Establishes annual 9-1-1 PSAP County Grants.

summary: Establishes "Summer Earn and Learn Pilot Program."

title: Plant species, endangered in NJ-concerns

title: COVID-19 response in NJ-establish bipartisan task force to study
summary: Establishes bipartisan task force to study response to COVID-19 in New Jersey.

title: Local utilities-exempt from certain reporting requirements

title: Wheelchair trailers-eliminates registration fee

title: Sex offenders-required to report internet identifiers and name changes

summary: Prohibits sex offenders from residing within 1,000 feet of victim's home or workplace.

summary: Provides a gross income tax deduction for veterinarian expenses.

title: Veteran-creates permanent commission to study various statutory definitions

summary: Authorizes hunters to ride in bed of pickup trucks under certain circumstances.

title: Affordable housing projects, cert-exempts sale of materials from sales & use tax
primary_sponsors: Karabinchak, Robert J.; Lopez, Yvonne; Swain, Lisa
summary: Exempts receipts from sales of materials, supplies, and services for certain affordable housing projects from sales and use tax.

title: Weigh-in-motion monitoring program-require DOT and DLPS implement
primary_sponsors: Karabinchak, Robert J.; Park, Ellen J.
summary: Requires DOT and DLPS to implement weigh-in-motion monitoring program.

title: Broadband telecommunication service-concerns wireless community service
primary_sponsors: Karabinchak, Robert J.; Stanley, Sterley S.; Rodriguez, Gabriel
summary: Removes requirement that local units may only provide broadband telecommunication service via wireless community service.

title: Energy Tax Receipts Property Tax Relief Aid program-revises
primary_sponsors: Scharfenberger, Gerry; DePhillips, Christopher P.; Flynn, Victoria A.
summary: Revises Energy Tax Receipts Property Tax Relief Aid program; requires all energy taxes to be paid directly to municipalities.

title: County planning board action-suspend running of timeframes during state of emerg
summary: Suspends running of timeframes for county planning board action during state of emergency.

title: State agencies-required to develop/submit information technology strategic plan
summary: Requires State agencies to develop and submit information technology strategic plan.

title: DOLWD-develop/execute Info. Technology stress test & emergency telework emp plan
summary: Requires DOLWD to develop and execute information technology stress test and emergency telework plan for employees.

title: Mendaden purse seine fishery-revises law establishing quota system
summary: Revises law establishing individual transferable quota system for menhaden purse seine fishery.

title: Voters, registered-require to present ID when voting at polling place
summary: Requires registered voters to present identification when voting at polling place.

title: Desecration-elevates offense degree based on pecuniary loss; bias intimidation
summary: Elevates the degree of desecration offense based upon the pecuniary loss; adds desecration to bias intimidation statute.

title: Computer crimes-incr. penalty, "bombing" online meeting under cert circumstances
summary: Increases penalty for "bombing" online meeting or teleconference under certain circumstances.

title: Influenza vaccinations-proh. govt. entity/school requiring for 18 yrs or younger
summary: Prohibits government entity or school from requiring influenza vaccinations for persons who are 18 years of age or younger.

title: COVID-19 vaccine-restrict establishment of mandates to become vaccinated
summary: Restricts establishment of mandates to become vaccinated against coronavirus disease 2019 (COVID-19); establishes reimbursement program to cover certain out-of-pocket costs incurred in obtaining COVID-19 vaccine.

title: Voter list maintenance & crosscheck prog-estab; cert regis data in annual report
primary_sponsors: Scharfenberger, Gerry; Matsikoudis, Michele; Flynn, Victoria A.
summary: Requires Secretary of State to establish voter list maintenance and crosscheck program and to include certain voter registration data in annual report to Governor and Legislature.

title: Electric svc. equip, customer-owned-reimb cost if damage is due to weather event
summary: Requires electric public utility to reimburse cost of certain customer-owned electric service equipment if damage to equipment is due to weather event affecting electric public utility service.

title: Civics instruction-req 11th grade students complete as part of graduation req.
summary: Requires 11th grade students to complete civics course as part of high school graduation requirements.

title: Election incident reporting and complaint database-Secretary of State establish
summary: Directs Secretary of State to establish election incident reporting and complaint database; requires certain telephone numbers be provided with voter instructions.

title: Administrative Costs of Public Institutions of Higher Education Commission-estab
summary: Establishes Commission on Administrative Costs of Public Institutions of Higher Education.

title: Open public records requests for commercial purposes-permit special svc charge
summary: Permits special service charge for commercial purpose public records requests; increases time to respond to commercial requests; provides penalty for failure to certify commercial purpose request.

title: Critical race theory-proh. teaching in public schools; proh teachers engaging in
summary: Prohibits teaching of critical race theory in public schools; prohibits public school teachers from engaging in political, ideological, or religious advocacy in classroom.

title: Resid. care fac.-grant auth representative online access to med/personal history
summary: Grants parents, guardians, and authorized representatives online access to medical and personal history of residents of certain residential care facilities.

title: Child custody determination & domestic viol-estab rebuttable presumption against
summary: Establishes rebuttable presumption against granting child custody under certain circumstances; expands best interests factors; adds coercive control to domestic violence definition.

title: Financial literacy instruction-requires public high school students receive
summary: Requires public high school students to receive financial literacy instruction on higher education costs, student financial assistance, and cryptocurrencies.

title: Police presence, polling locations-assigned to school if used as polling place
primary_sponsors: Scharfenberger, Gerry; Flynn, Victoria A.; Webber, Jay
summary: Permits police officers to be assigned to school if school is being used as polling place during conduct of election.

title: Sex education curriculum-req parental consent for student to participate in
primary_sponsors: Scharfenberger, Gerry; Matsikoudis, Michele; Flynn, Victoria A.
summary: Requires parental consent for student to participate in health, family life education or sex education program.

title: Vaccinations, COVID-19 & monkeypox-prohibit req for students who attend remotely
summary: Prohibits public institutions of higher education from requiring vaccinations against COVID-19 and monkeypox for students who attend remotely.

title: Teacher certification, temp five-yr-establish for veterans in cert circumstances
primary_sponsors: Scharfenberger, Gerry; Matsikoudis, Michele; Flynn, Victoria A.
summary: Establishes temporary five-year teacher certification for veterans in certain circumstances.

title: Corporation business tax-temp. lowers tax rate for five years & repeals surtax
summary: Temporarily lowers corporation business tax rate for five years and repeals corporation business surtax.

title: Immunization Information System-prohibits automatic registration
summary: Prohibits automatic registration with New Jersey Immunization Information System.

title: Real Estate Comm soliciting owners regarding home sale-req initial text message
summary: Requires text messages soliciting home owners to provide notice when individuals sending solicitations are not licensed by New Jersey Real Estate Commission.*

title: Medical records, minor patients-require parents/guardians be provided access
primary_sponsors: Scharfenberger, Gerry; Flynn, Victoria A.; Webber, Jay
summary: Requires parents and guardians be provided access medical records of minor patients.

title: Xylazine-classify as Schedule III controlled dangerous substance
summary: Classifies xylazine as Schedule III controlled dangerous substance under certain circumstances.

title: Lithium ion powered electric vehicles-require certain disclosures
summary: Requires certain disclosures regarding lithium ion powered electric vehicles.

title: Sonar testing permit program-directs DEP to establish
summary: Directs DEP to establish sonar testing permit program.

title: Stand Your Ground, self defense law-establish
summary: Establishes "Stand Your Ground" self-defense law.

title: Homeschooling expenses, certain-provide gross income tax credit
summary: Provides gross income tax credit for certain homeschooling expenses incurred by parent or guardian with increased credit for taxpayers homeschooling child or dependent with special needs.

title: Sick leave, earned-req employers provide, amendable contracts & do not expire
summary: Requires employers whose employees are subject to contracts that are amendable and do not expire to provide earned sick leave.

title: Madalyn's Law-toxic shock syndrome, install age-appropriate signs in ladies room
primary_sponsors: Flynn, Victoria A.; Scharfenberger, Gerry; Murphy, Carol A.
summary: "Madalyn's Law"; requires school districts to incorporate age-appropriate instruction on toxic shock syndrome and requires installation of signage in certain women's rooms to enhance public awareness of toxic shock syndrome.

title: Drunk driver-req. orders of restitution to child of parent or guardian killed by
summary: Requires orders of restitution to child of parent or guardian killed by drunk driver.

title: Devel Disab, Division-align rates for self-directed empl w/max svc provider rate
summary: Requires Director of Division of Developmental Disabilities to align rates for self-directed employees with maximum service provider rates.

title: Vietnam Veterans Memorial Foundation-approp. fds; expand memorial & museum;$2.5M
summary: Appropriates $2.5 million to NJ Vietnam Veterans' Memorial Foundation for purpose of expanding memorial and museum.

title: Improved Suicide Prevention, Response and Treatment Act
summary: "Improved Suicide Prevention, Response, and Treatment Act."

title: Brewery license, limited-authorizes holder to engage in certain activities
summary: Authorizes holder of limited brewery license to engage in certain activities.

title: NJSBA-removes requirement that all boards of education be members
summary: Removes requirement that all boards of education be members of NJSBA.

title: Municipal govt., optional plan-proh pub question on adoption at special election
summary: Prohibits public question on adoption of optional plan of municipal government at special election.

title: Tracking for unlawful purpose-creates offense; imposes enhanced penalties
summary: Creates offense of tracking for unlawful purpose; imposes enhanced penalties.

title: Automobile theft, use of juvenile-mand min sentence imprisonment, second offense
summary: Establishes mandatory minimum sentence of imprisonment for second offense involving use of juvenile in automobile theft.

title: Law enforce, encounter w/underage person for alco/cannabis-remove cert crim liab
summary: Removes criminal liability for law enforcement officers who have investigative encounter with underage person for possession of alcohol or cannabis unless civil rights are violated.

title: Cannabis-directs product be stored/kept in locked container; estab civil penalty
summary: Directs that cannabis product be stored or kept in locked container; establishes civil penalty for violation.

title: Assault & harassment against sports officials & participants-increases penalties
summary: Increases penalties for assault and harassment against sports officials and participants under certain circumstances.

title: Harassment, intimidation, bullying-modify min. req for school policy prohibiting
summary: Modifies minimum requirements for school district policies prohibiting harassment, intimidation or bullying.

title: Fireworks-prohibits use on property adjacent to animal shelter, pound, or kennel
summary: Prohibits use of fireworks on property adjacent to animal shelter, pound, or kennel.

title: Threats against prosecutors, law enforcement officers-second degree crime
summary: Establishes threats of violence against prosecutors, law enforcement officers and their family members as a second degree crime, subject to the No Early Release Act sentencing.

title: First-time homebuyers w/most abandoned properties-establish loan program;$5M
summary: Establishes loan program for first-time homebuyers who move to areas with most abandoned properties; appropriates $5 million.

title: Businesses employing released nonviolent offenders-allow CBT & income tax credit
summary: Allows corporation business tax and gross income tax credits to businesses employing released nonviolent offenders.

title: Tenants, sr citizens & certain with disabilities-extend protected tenancy period
summary: Extends protected tenancy period for certain tenants who are senior citizens and certain tenants with disabilities.

title: Motor vehicle theft-incr. penalty if creating risk of injury or property damage
summary: Increases penalty for motor vehicle theft if, during course of theft, vehicle is operated in manner creating risk of injury or property damage.

title: COVID-19 Learning Loss Study Commission-establishes
summary: Establishes "COVID-19 Learning Loss Study Commission."

title: Substitute teacher credential pathway, temporary-extends application period
summary: Extends application period of temporary substitute teacher credential pathway.

title: Voter registration-req Secretary of St & Chief Admin of MVC conduct annual audit
summary: Requires Secretary of State and Chief Administration of MVC to conduct audit of certain voter registrations and annual audits thereafter; requires proof of citizenship for voter registration at MVC.

title: Mental health impact of COVID-19 pandemic, K-12 students-estab. comm. to study
primary_sponsors: Flynn, Victoria A.; Scharfenberger, Gerry; Matsikoudis, Michele
summary: Establishes commission to study mental health impact of COVID-19 pandemic on K-12 students.

title: Donations to eligible schools-provide income tax credit to assist in funding
summary: Provides gross income tax credit for donations to eligible schools to assist in funding of student meals, medical supplies, and playground equipment.

title: Unclaimed property-concerns debtor search & unpaid child support judgement
summary: Subjects unclaimed property to judgment debtor search; prioritizes unpaid child support judgment.

title: Probate matters-auth. Surrogate establish system to accept electronic signatures
primary_sponsors: Flynn, Victoria A.; Guardian, Donald A.
summary: Authorizes Surrogate of every county to establish electronic systems to accept electronic signatures on qualifying documents in probate matters.

title: Telemarketing harassment intimidation-task force to study technology to reduce
primary_sponsors: Flynn, Victoria A.; Guardian, Donald A.
summary: Establishes task force to study technology and other methods used to reduce or eliminate telemarketing harassment and intimidation.

title: Suicide prevention training-required for mental health practitioners
summary: Requires suicide prevention training for mental health practitioners.

title: Municipal energy tax receipts property tax relief aid-concerns increases
summary: Requires any increase in local government costs for employee health care and prescription benefits coverage be offset by equivalent increase in municipal energy tax receipts property tax relief aid.

title: Electric vehicle fires-require allocation to support EMT & firefighter training
summary: Requires allocation of Universal Service Fund to support emergency medical technician and firefighter training concerning electric vehicle fires.

title: Computer & sch supply sale-exempt from "Sales & Use Tax Act";$500 tax deduction
summary: Exempts from "Sales and Use Tax Act" certain retail sales of computers and school supplies; allows $500 gross income tax deduction to teachers purchasing school supplies for classroom use.

title: Postpartum depression-add to behavioral health crisis services system
summary: Adds postpartum depression services to State's behavioral health crisis services system.

title: Sales tax holiday-establish four-day exemption period after Thanksgiving
summary: Establishes annual four-day sales tax holiday after Thanksgiving.

title: Military member/vet addressing students-proh ed instit adopting policy that bar
summary: Prohibits school districts and public institutions of higher education from adopting policies that bar military members or veterans from addressing students.

title: Crisis hotline center-req to employ individual w/ experience working w/ veterans
summary: Requires crisis hotline centers to employ individuals with prior experience working with military veterans.

title: Motor vehicle theft-increase penalties; authorize home detention for minors
summary: Increases penalties for motor vehicle theft; authorizes home detention for minors.

title: Motor vehicle theft & carjacking-increase penalties; estab. pretrial detention
summary: Increases penalties for certain motor vehicle theft and carjacking offenses; establishes presumption of pretrial detention in enumerated circumstances.

title: Carjacking & theft by deception-increase penalty; establish pretrial detention
summary: Increases penalty and establishes presumption of pretrial detention for persons who commit carjacking and theft by deception in certain circumstances.

title: Children's psychiatric facilities-on-site staff members supervise patients 24/7
summary: Requires children's psychiatric facilities to have on-site staff members supervise patients 24 hours a day, seven days a week.

title: Mammograms-lower age certain insurers are required to provide coverage for
primary_sponsors: Flynn, Victoria A.; Muñoz, Nancy F.
summary: Lowers age at which certain insurers are required to provide coverage for mammograms.

title: Interstate Teacher Mobility Compact-enact
summary: Enacts "Interstate Teacher Mobility Compact."

title: Pandemic Education Relief Act-provide additional school aid for cert districts
summary: "Pandemic Education Relief Act"; provides additional State school aid for certain school districts that have previously experienced reductions and establishes allowable uses of aid.

title: Tiered group home placement and transfers-develop guidelines for
summary: Requires Division of Developmental Disabilities to develop guidelines for tiered group home placements and transfers.

title: Sales tax imposition, reduced-prov. for retail sales by certain small businesses
summary: Provides for reduced sales tax imposition for retail sales by certain small businesses.

title: Theft of motor vehicle-establish rebuttable presumption, detained prior to trial
summary: Establishes rebuttable presumption that person charged with theft of motor vehicle be detained prior to trial.

title: Recalled judge-increases per diem allowance
summary: Increases per diem allowance of recalled judge.

title: Council on Local Mandates-increase membership & prov cert meeting requirements
summary: Increases membership and provides for certain meeting requirements of Council on Local Mandates.

title: Comm. on Human Trafficking-identify methods to prevent, online gaming platforms
summary: Requires Commission on Human Trafficking to identify methods to prevent human trafficking through online gaming platforms.

title: Caregiver's Assistance Act-income tax credit incurred for care of sr family memb
primary_sponsors: Schaer, Gary S.; Sumter, Shavonda E.
summary: Provides gross income tax credit for certain expenses paid or incurred for care and support of qualifying senior family member; designated as Caregiver's Assistance Act.

title: Student w/concussion-evaluate by lic. health care prof prior to returning to sch
summary: Requires public school students with concussion to be evaluated by licensed health care professionals before return to school; requires school districts to provide restrictions or limitations to student as needed.

title: Local unit sharing of services-encourages
summary: Encourages local unit sharing of services; makes appropriations.

title: Motor vehicle lease-allows termination in event of death and prohibits fee
summary: Allows termination of motor vehicle lease in event of death; prohibits imposition of fee for early termination.

title: Veterans-provides up to 60 tuition-free credits at county colleges
summary: Provides veterans with up to 60 credits tuition-free at county college serving county of residence.

title: Health benefit plans-concerns unlawful employment practices based on provision
summary: Concerns unlawful employment practices based on provision of health benefits plans.

title: Sick leave, unused-limits payments and limits vacation leave carried-forward
summary: Limits certain payments for unused sick leave earned after effective date by public officers or employees; limits vacation leave carry-forward and requires suspension and forfeiture of certain supplemental compensation.

title: Wage and hour law-increases certain penalties for violations
summary: Increases certain penalties for violations of wage and hour law.

title: Autonomous vehicles on State roadways-permits testing and use
summary: Permits testing and use of autonomous vehicles on State roadways under certain circumstances.

title: Prescription drugs for certain medical conditions-continued coverage required
summary: Requires continued coverage of prescription drugs for certain medical conditions.

title: Motor vehicles, self-driv-clarify owner comply w/existing insurance requirements
summary: Clarifies that owners of self-driving motor vehicles must comply with existing insurance requirements.

title: Student Loan Assistance and Home Purchase Act-establishes
primary_sponsors: DeAngelo, Wayne P.; Haider, Shama A.
summary: Establishes the "Student Loan Assistance and Home Purchase Act."

title: Juvenile-family crisis information-allow law enforcement to provide sch. w/info.
summary: Allows law enforcement agencies to provide juvenile-family crisis information to principal of juvenile's school for planning programs relevant to juvenile's educational and social development.

title: At-risk youths-law enforcement agencies coordinate w/sch dist to ID and assist
summary: Establishes two-year pilot program requiring certain law enforcement agencies to coordinate with local school districts to identify and assist at-risk youths.

title: Special education students-attend college courses/vocational training pilot prog
summary: Establishes pilot program in DOE for special education students to attend college courses or vocational training programs.

title: Student loan payments-establishes gross income and CBT credits
summary: Establishes gross income tax credit and corporation business tax credit for student loan payments.

title: Teachers & school leaders-estab task force, examine professional development req
summary: Establishes task force to examine and make recommendations regarding professional development requirements for public school teachers and school leaders.

title: Virtual learning in sch. dist. w/teacher shortages-conduct study on feasibility
summary: Directs DOE to conduct study on feasibility of using and expanding virtual learning in school districts with teacher shortages.

title: School meals, bill in arrears-clarifies school dist cannot restrict meal access
primary_sponsors: Greenwald, Louis D.; Morales, Carmen Theresa
summary: Requires school districts to take certain actions in circumstances when school meal bill is in arrears; prohibits shaming students with school meal bills in arrears; prohibits certain district actions in collecting unpaid school meal fees.

title: School Meal Fund-sch district establish to assist student w/meal bill in arrears
summary: Requires school district to establish "School Meal Fund" to assist students with school meal bill in arrears.

title: Child care expenses-allows gross income tax credit for portion
summary: Allows gross income tax credit for portion of certain child care expenses.

title: Grow NJ Kids-rated child care program-Higher Ed Student Asst Auth issue vouchers
summary: Requires Higher Education Student Assistance Authority to issue vouchers in amount of monthly loan repayment amount for loan borrowers who have child enrolled in Grow NJ Kids-rated child care program.

title: Audio or visual media intentionally deceptive-requires disclosure
summary: Requires certain disclosures of intentionally deceptive audio or visual media.

title: Developmental Disab Division-make comprehensive program list available to public
summary: Requires Division of Developmental Disabilities to make comprehensive list of its programs available to public.

title: Developmental disabilities-transfers certain individuals from DHS to DCF
summary: Transfers administration of programs for certain individuals with developmental disabilities from DHS to DCF.

title: Developmental disabled svcs-recover federal fund excess, support community infra
summary: Directs certain recoveries of federal funds for services to persons with developmental disabilities be used for grants to support community infrastructure purposes.

title: Carbon monoxide detectors-required in school buildings
summary: Requires carbon monoxide detectors in school buildings.

title: Marijuana, medical-estab. protection from adverse emp action for auth. patients
summary: Establishes protection from adverse employment action for authorized medical cannabis patients.

title: Solar photovoltaic panels-BPU-certified person install on noise barriers & roads
summary: Authorizes DOT, NJTA, and SJTA to permit BPU-certified persons to install and maintain solar photovoltaic panels on noise barriers erected on roads and highways.

title: Youth serving organization employees & volunteers-registry for background checks
summary: Establishes central registry for background checks of youth serving organization employees and volunteers.

title: Sustainable Tiny Home Pilot Program-HMFA establish in 3 regions of the State;$5M
summary: Requires HMFA to establish "Sustainable Tiny Home Pilot Program" in three regions of State; appropriates $5 million.

title: Sexual assault allegations, certain-employers required to report
summary: Requires employers to report certain allegations of sexual assault.

title: Grow Your Own Loan Redemption Program-establishes
summary: Establishes Grow Your Own Teacher Loan Redemption Program in Higher Education Student Assistance Authority.

title: Title IX-provide students w/information on rights; provide coordinator's number
summary: Requires public schools, and nonpublic schools which receive federal funding, to provide students with information on rights afforded under Title IX, and provide contact information for Title IX coordinator.

title: Education funding, federal-req DOE annually report use of fed COVID-19 relief fd
summary: Requires Department of Education to annually report use of federal COVID-19 relief funds.

title: Intern Protection Act-provide legal protections and remedies for persons engaged
summary: The "New Jersey Intern Protection Act"; provides legal protections and remedies for persons engaged in internships with employers.

title: Child care provider-proh charging fees, days unable to provide svc due to COVID
summary: Prohibits child care providers from charging any fees for service on days when providers are unable to provide child care services due to contraction of, or exposure to, COVID-19.

title: School employees, public-eliminates requirement for State residency for 3 years
summary: Eliminates requirement for State residency of public school employees for period of three years.

title: Government records custodians-permit to redact certain personal information
summary: Permits government records custodians to redact certain personal information.

title: Cosmetology & hairstyling exam-allow State Bd conduct at school during pub emerg
summary: Allows New Jersey State Board of Cosmetology and Hairstyling to conduct examinations at school of cosmetology and hairstyling during public health emergency or state of emergency.

title: Cosmetology & hairstyling teachers-allow cert licensees teach in private schools
primary_sponsors: Lampitt, Pamela R.; Park, Ellen J.; Speight, Shanique
summary: Allows certain licensees of New Jersey State Board of Cosmetology and Hairstyling to teach in private schools of cosmetology and hairstyling.

title: Local government employee on paid leave-proh a different county from employing
primary_sponsors: Lampitt, Pamela R.; Miller, Cody D.; Carter, Linda S.
summary: Prohibits local government agency from employing person on paid leave from local government agency of another county or municipality.

title: Teaching staff member certification-State Bd of Examiners expedite determination
summary: Provides expedited determination by State Board of Examiners on application for teaching staff member certification if certain criteria are met.

title: School breakfast kiosk pilot program-establish
summary: Establishes school breakfast kiosk pilot program.

title: Child care centers, licensed-establish grant program, construct kitchen fac.;$1M
summary: Establishes grant program for constructing kitchen facilities in licensed child care centers; appropriates $1,000,000.

title: Council of Women in Higher Education-estab. in St. Dept. to study/promote issues
summary: Establishes Council of Women in Higher Education in Department of State to study and promote women's issues within institutions of higher education.

title: Sexual assault training for law enforcement-expand scope
summary: Expands scope of law enforcement sexual assault training; codifies certain responsibilities of county sexual violence programs and rape care advocates.

title: Affidavit of merit-plaintiff obtain in malpractice suit against enrolled agent
summary: Requires plaintiff to obtain affidavit of merit in malpractice suit against enrolled agent.

title: Prescription drug pricing disclosure requirement, measures and reduce cost-estab
summary: Establishes prescription drug pricing disclosure requirements and measures to reduce prescription drug costs.

title: NJSchoolJobs.com-DOE post link on homepage of its website
summary: Requires DOE to post link to NJSchoolJobs.com on homepage of its website and to promote link through social media.

title: Food service advisory committee-consider menu options reflect dietary preference
summary: Requires each school district with middle school or high school to establish food services advisory committee to consider menu options that reflect students' cultural, traditional, and dietary preferences.

title: Hooked on Fishing-Not on Drugs Program;$450K
primary_sponsors: Verrelli, Anthony S.; Simonsen, Erik K.
summary: Appropriates $450,000 for Hooked on Fishing-Not on Drugs Program.

title: Higher education students, child custody-prohibits requiring to purch meal plans
summary: Prohibits institutions of higher education from requiring students who have children to purchase meal plans, live in on-campus housing, or pay gym fees.

title: Network adequacy & mental health care-req. health benf. plan & carrier meet reqs
summary: Requires health benefits plan and carriers to meet certain requirements concerning network adequacy and mental health care.

title: Pub. school student mental health svcs-permit referral to private prof counselor
primary_sponsors: Lampitt, Pamela R.; Greenwald, Louis D.; Speight, Shanique
summary: Permits certain mental health professionals working in school districts to refer or help facilitate referral of students to professional counselors.*

title: Veterinarians-clarify not withing ambit of telemedicine & telehealth law
summary: Clarifies that veterinarians are not within ambit of telemedicine and telehealth law.

title: Nurses-estab. certain reqs & initiatives; transfer oversight to Board of Nursing
primary_sponsors: Haider, Shama A.; Speight, Shanique; Reynolds-Jackson, Verlina
summary: Establishes certain requirements and initiatives related to nurses; transfers oversight of certified nurse aides from DOH to Board of Nursing; appropriates $26.7 million.

title: Schools for students with disabilities, private-estab timeline for annual audits
summary: Establishes timelines for review and approval by Commissioner of Education of annual certified audits submitted by approved private schools for students with disabilities.

title: Teacher certification-estab. route, candidate w/Montessori teaching credentials
summary: Establishes teacher certification route for candidates with Montessori teaching credentials.

title: Paper bags, single-use-elim. prohibition on, grocery stores for delivery orders
summary: Eliminates prohibition on provision of single-use paper bags by grocery stores for delivery orders; requires certain retailers to repurpose cardboard boxes if feasible.

title: Nursing students, graduated-authorizes temporary licensure
summary: Authorizes temporary licensure of graduated nursing students; waives fees for nurse licensure applicants who work at long-term care facilities.

title: Child care subsidies-concerns criteria for cert teacher/school emp due to hours
summary: Prohibits DHS from deeming certain teachers and school employees ineligible for child care subsidies due to number of hours worked when school is not in session for students.

title: Board members, institutions of higher education-revise training requirements
summary: Revises training requirements for governing board members of public institutions of higher education.

title: Teachers, certain-remove obstacles to teacher certification
primary_sponsors: Lampitt, Pamela R.; Lopez, Yvonne; Bagolie, Rosaura
summary: Removes obstacles to teacher certification for certain teachers; repeals law establishing alternative certificate of eligibility.*

title: NJCLASS Teacher Loan Redemption Program-expand eligibility
summary: Expands eligibility for NJCLASS Teacher Loan Redemption Program.

title: Full-time educator and paraprofessional-provide gross income deduction;$500
summary: Provides deduction from gross income of $500 for full-time educators and paraprofessionals and $350 for part-time educators and paraprofessionals.

title: Homestead prop tax reimbursement-make person receiving disab payments eligible
primary_sponsors: Lampitt, Pamela R.; Karabinchak, Robert J.; Hutchison, Dan
summary: Makes disabled persons receiving disability payments pursuant to federal Railroad Retirement Act eligible to receive homestead property tax reimbursement.

title: Right to Mental Health, Individuals who are Deaf or Hard of Hearing Act-concerns
primary_sponsors: Lampitt, Pamela R.; Murphy, Carol A.; Simmons, Heather
summary: "Right to Mental Health for Individuals who are Deaf or Hard of Hearing Act"; establishes certain requirements concerning provision of mental health services to individuals who are deaf or hard of hearing.*

title: Reproductive rights-require any website also provide info on adoption services
summary: Requires any State website providing information on reproductive rights to also provide information on adoption services.

title: TPAF-extend membership, 7 yrs after discontinuance & 25 yrs for those laid off
primary_sponsors: Lampitt, Pamela R.; Bagolie, Rosaura; Stanley, Sterley S.
summary: Extends membership in TPAF to 10 years after discontinuance of service and to 15 years for those who were laid off or had 10 or more years of continuous service upon voluntary termination.*

title: Database of novice teachers-requires DOE establish and host job fairs
summary: Requires DOLWD, in consultation with DOE, to establish database of novice teachers and to host job fairs.*

title: Electric sch buses-auth competitive contracting/extended terms, lease & purchase
primary_sponsors: Lampitt, Pamela R.; Bagolie, Rosaura; Stanley, Sterley S.
summary: Authorizes extended terms for lease and purchase contracts for electric school buses; permits New Jersey School Boards Association to serve as government aggregator to obtain energy services for local units.*

title: Homeless Bill of Rights
summary: "Homeless Bill of Rights."

title: Mammograms-req. health insur coverage, women over & under 35, cert circumstances
primary_sponsors: Atkins, Reginald W.; Reynolds-Jackson, Verlina; Venezia, Michael
summary: Requires health insurers, SHBP, and SEHBP to cover mammograms for women over 35 and women under 35 under certain circumstances.

title: Vacant Storefront Registry Prog-estab public database of vacant commercial space
primary_sponsors: Atkins, Reginald W.; Morales, Carmen Theresa
summary: Vacant Storefront Registry Program; establishes public database of vacant commercial space for small businesses.

title: Student caregivers-directs DOE to conduct study
summary: Directs DOE to conduct study concerning student caregivers.

title: Student Learning Standards, Social Studies-provide instruction on labor movement
primary_sponsors: Atkins, Reginald W.; Carter, Linda S.; Sampson, William B.
summary: Requires State Board of Education to adopt New Jersey Student Learning Standards pertaining to labor movement; requires school districts to provide instruction on labor movement.*

title: Wildlife crossings-estab program for construction on certain roads and highways
primary_sponsors: Atkins, Reginald W.; Stanley, Sterley S.; Haider, Shama A.
summary: Requires DOT to establish program for construction of wildlife crossings on certain roads and highways.

title: Physical education/sport programs-permit students to opt out during Ramadan
primary_sponsors: Atkins, Reginald W.; Haider, Shama A.; Venezia, Michael
summary: Permits public high school students to opt out of physical education and sports programs during Ramadan.

title: Halal lunch options-require school districts offer
primary_sponsors: Atkins, Reginald W.; Reynolds-Jackson, Verlina; Morales, Carmen Theresa
summary: Requires school districts to offer halal lunch options.

title: Citizenship, US-req school districts provide information on process of obtaining

title: Funeral, burial, crematory services-suppl. approp, increase reimb Work First;$8M
summary: Makes supplemental appropriation of $8 million to DHS to increase reimbursement for funeral, burial, and crematory services provided to certain beneficiaries of Work First New Jersey and Supplemental Security Income programs.

title: Vendors that employ veterans-DMVA grant preference in awarding contracts
primary_sponsors: Tucker, Cleopatra G.; Murphy, Carol A.; Reynolds-Jackson, Verlina
summary: Authorizes DMVA to grant preference in awarding contracts to vendors that employ veterans.

title: Woman Veteran-authorizes creation of license plates
summary: Authorizes creation of Woman Veteran license plates.

title: Disabled veterans-allows property tax rebate
primary_sponsors: Tucker, Cleopatra G.; Marenco, Julio; Sauickie, Alex
summary: Allows property tax rebate for disabled veterans.

title: Combat Action Ribbon-authorizes creation of license plate
summary: Authorizes creation of Combat Action Ribbon license plate.

title: Paramus & Menlo Park vet mem homes-converting portion, single occupancy rooms
summary: Requires converting portion of Paramus and Menlo Park veterans' memorial homes into single occupancy rooms; requires upgrades to ventilation systems; provides Adjutant General discretion for additional room considerations.

title: Veterans, Medicaid eligibility-req. DHS disregard cert. federal pension benefits
summary: Requires DHS to disregard certain federal pension benefits for veterans in making Medicaid eligibility determinations.

title: Sexual assault involving military personnel-makes various changes to address
summary: Makes various changes to address sexual assault and child abuse and neglect involving military personnel; addresses protection, penalties, enforcement, jurisdiction, and victim compensation matters.

title: Veterans' services-req counties to specify expenditures when submitting budget
primary_sponsors: Tucker, Cleopatra G.; Murphy, Carol A.
summary: Requires counties to specify expenditures concerning veterans' services when submitting budget to Division of Local Government Services in DCA.

title: Catholic Charities, Diocese of Paterson-SOS Vet Unmet Needs Fund;$500K
primary_sponsors: Tucker, Cleopatra G.; Dunn, Aura K.
summary: Makes supplemental appropriation of $500,000 to DMVA for New Jersey SOS Veterans Stakeholders Group.

title: Mental health services to veterans-establish and allocate funds for program;$2M
primary_sponsors: Tucker, Cleopatra G.; DeAngelo, Wayne P.
summary: Establishes and allocates funds for program to provide mental health services to veterans; appropriates $2 million.

title: Veteran Services Grant Program-establish in DMVA; makes appropriation
primary_sponsors: Tucker, Cleopatra G.; DeAngelo, Wayne P.
summary: Establishes New Jersey Veteran Services Grant Program in DMVA; makes appropriation.

summary: Special legislation to change name of "Township of South Orange Village" to "South Orange Village"; changes titles of certain municipal officials; permits nonpartisan municipal elections to be moved to November; permits stipend for governing body members.

title: Electric public utility-identify communities relying on private well water
summary: Requires electric public utility to identify communities within service territory where at least 40 percent of residential customers rely on private well water, develop service restoration plan for those communities, and provide watering stations.

title: Veteran, volunteer emergency worker-fee for mobile sportfishing vehicle permit
summary: Prohibits DEP from charging fee for resident mobile sportfishing vehicle permit to veterans, active military members, former or current members of the NJ National Guard or Reserve, or volunteer emergency workers.

title: Child abuse record info. check-emp and candidates for pub sch emp or svc undergo
summary: Requires certain employees and candidates for public school employment or service and youth camp employees to undergo child abuse record information check.

title: Cancer Research-provides for voluntary contributions by income tax returns
summary: Provides for voluntary contributions by taxpayers on gross income tax returns for New Jersey Commission on Cancer Research.

title: Property tax bills, permits, receipts-auth. municipality to deliver via e-mail
summary: Authorizes municipality to deliver property tax bills, construction permits, and receipts for payment via e-mail.

title: Child abuse & neglect-require DCF & DOE provide service or information remotely
summary: Requires DCF and DOE to provide certain child abuse and neglect services or information remotely or through distance learning mechanisms.

title: Service & emotional support animals-permits dogs at State vets resid. facilities
primary_sponsors: Dunn, Aura K.; Karabinchak, Robert J.; Tucker, Cleopatra G.
summary: Permits dogs as service and emotional support animals at State veterans' residential facilities.

title: SNAP participation-certain students exempt from 20 hour weekly work requirement
summary: Provides for student recipients of educational opportunity funds to be exempt from 20 hour weekly work requirement ordinarily required for student SNAP participation.

title: Community-based residential prog. & group homes-allow cert. in-person visitation
primary_sponsors: Dunn, Aura K.; Flynn, Victoria A.
summary: Requires Division of Developmental Disabilities, during public health emergency, to develop guidance for in-person visitation at community-based residential settings for individuals with developmental disabilities and require providers to allow such visitation.

title: Drivers, licensing-permits certain drivers' schools to conduct road tests
summary: Permits certain drivers' schools to conduct road tests.

title: Motor Vehicle Commission-review and provide certain services online
summary: Requires MVC to review certain services and provide certain services online.

title: Transparency in Government Act; establish a State public finance website
summary: "Transparency in Government Act;" provides for establishment of State public finance website; requires certain public entities receiving State funds to establish similar website; makes an appropriation.

title: Municipality reimb.-estab. fund for police & sanitation, crowding at MVC;$500K
summary: Establishes fund to reimburse municipalities for police and sanitation costs related to crowding at MVC sites; appropriates $500,000.

title: Vote-by-mail-permit co. clerk remove voters from lists under cert. circumstances
summary: Permits county clerk to remove voters from vote-by-mail lists under certain circumstances.

title: Vets.-create prog., receive evaluation & treatment for PTSD & total brain injury
summary: Requires Adjutant General of DMVA create program for veterans to receive evaluation and treatment for PTSD and total brain injury.

title: Sally's Law-concerns infectious disease control/prevention in long-term care fac
primary_sponsors: Dunn, Aura K.; Murphy, Carol A.
summary: Establishes testing and visitation requirements and employment restrictions for long-term care facilities in response to outbreaks of infectious disease.

title: Mental Health Awareness Pilot Program-establish in DOE
primary_sponsors: Dunn, Aura K.; Murphy, Carol A.; Verrelli, Anthony S.
summary: Establishes Mental Health Awareness Pilot Program in DOE.

title: Vote by Mail Study Commission-establish, report mail-in ballot irregularities
summary: Requires Secretary of State create website for voters to report irregularities regarding mail-in ballots; establishes "Vote by Mail Study Commission."

title: Cancer Research, Comm.-increase tobacco product tax revenues from $1M to $4M
summary: Increases amount of cigarette and other tobacco products tax revenues provided to New Jersey Commission on Cancer Research from $1 million to $4 million; establishes dedicated, non-lapsing Cancer Research Fund.

title: Youth suicide, causes-requires DOH to study
summary: Requires DOH to conduct study on causes of youth suicide.

title: Accidental death benefit-provide, St Police recruit dies during pre-svc training
primary_sponsors: Dunn, Aura K.; DeAngelo, Wayne P.
summary: Provides accidental death benefit to surviving spouse, surviving child, or surviving parent of a State Police recruit who dies during required pre-service training.

title: Mail-in ballot-req do not forward label; allow voter to cure due to missing cert
summary: Requires do not forward label on mail-in ballot envelopes; allows mail-in voter to cure mail-in ballot due to missing or detached certificate; requires certain voter data be entered into voter file within 30 days.

title: Digital Divide Solutions Grant Program-estab, assist pub sch for Internet access
summary: Establishes Digital Divide Solutions Grant Program in DOE to assist public schools in purchase of connected devices and Internet access for students during periods of remote instruction.

title: Suicidal ideation for postpartum women-req health insur carriers prov coverage
summary: Requires health insurance carriers to provide coverage for suicidal ideation and attempted suicide for postpartum women.

title: Sexual assault prevention & response prog. & coordinator for svc members-creates
primary_sponsors: Dunn, Aura K.; Tucker, Cleopatra G.
summary: Creates sexual assault prevention and response program and coordinator for service members.

title: Curriculum plans-requires public schools to post online
primary_sponsors: Dunn, Aura K.; DiMaio, John; Fantasia, Dawn
summary: Requires public schools to post curriculum plans online; requires school districts to make textbooks or other materials used in implementing curriculum plans available for inspection by parents and legal guardians.

title: Unemployment Intake Accountability Pilot Program-creates
summary: Creates "Unemployment Intake Accountability Pilot Program."

title: Military svc. members, cert non-US-concerns civil svc exam & veterans preference
summary: Permits certain non-US citizen military service members to take civil service examinations and be eligible for civil service veterans preference.

title: Retirement plans, qualified-gross income tax exclusion for minimum req. distrib.
summary: Provides gross income tax exclusion for minimum required distributions from qualified retirement plans.

summary: Establishes eligibility for PERS enrollment and retirement benefits for certain county fire instructors under certain conditions.

summary: Requires board of education to publicly post full meeting agenda 48 hours prior to meeting.

title: Service dogs-provide to frontline workers suffering from PTSD due to COVID-19
summary: Requires DHS to provide psychiatric service dogs to first responders, health care workers, and other frontline workers suffering from post-traumatic stress disorders due to the COVID-19 pandemic.

title: PTSD related to COVID-19-req. health care facilities to screen frontline workers
summary: Requires health care facilities to screen health care workers and first responders for symptoms of post-traumatic stress disorder related to COVID-19 pandemic.

title: Transparency website, government-publish certain financial information
summary: Requires State Treasurer to publish certain State expenditure and revenue information on government transparency website.

title: Child of deceased veteran-proh. public instit of higher ed from charging tuition
summary: Prohibits public institution of higher education from charging tuition to student who is dependent child of veteran who died or is disabled as result of service-related injury.

title: School district performance audits-requires State Auditor to conduct
summary: Requires State Auditor to conduct performance audits of certain school districts.

title: Mental health professionals who serve children/adolescents-income tax credit

summary: Requires State agencies, when developing and proposing rules, to utilize approaches that will accomplish objectives of statutory law while minimizing adverse economic impact on municipalities.

title: Voter registration records-require audit in Statewide Voter Registration System
summary: Requires Secretary of State and county commissioners of registration to perform audit of voter registration records in Statewide Voter Registration System.

summary: Permits U.S. citizens who are full time college students to be district board members in county of college even if student is not a resident of county or State.

title: Car wash business-permit to operate during state of emerg or public health emerg
summary: Permits car wash business to operate during state of emergency or public health emergency.

title: Child care services-permanently req provider subsidy pymt be based on enrollment
summary: Permanently requires certain provider subsidy payments for child care services be based on enrollment.

title: Voter registration process, automatic-requires MVC to safeguard
primary_sponsors: Dunn, Aura K.; Barranco, Christian E.
summary: Requires MVC to safeguard automatic voter registration process.

title: Children, Office of Ombudsman for-establishes
summary: Establishes Office of Ombudsman for Children.

title: Land use applications, certain-extends time period required for public notice
primary_sponsors: Dunn, Aura K.; Sauickie, Alex; Atkins, Reginald W.
summary: Extends time period required for public notice of certain land use applications.

title: Governor's budget recommendations-estab. process for submittal & publication
summary: Establishes process for submittal and publication of proposed revisions to Governor's budget recommendations and requires publication of proposals by June 1 annually.

title: Recovery residence certification program-DCA approve credentialing entity devel.
summary: Requires DCA to approve credentialing entity to develop and administer voluntary recovery residence certification program.

title: Agriculture development boards, county-creates alternate voting members
summary: Creates alternate voting members on county agriculture development boards.

title: Public Service Management Fellows Program & advisory committee-establishes
summary: Establishes Public Service Management Fellows Program and advisory committee.

title: Solicitation of business based on death notices and obituaries-prohibits
summary: Prohibits solicitation of business based on death notices and obituaries.

title: Pet food sales-exempt from sales and use tax
summary: Exempts sales of pet food purchased for pets from the sales and use tax.

title: Animal shelters-allow gross income tax deduction for donations
summary: Allows gross income tax deduction for donations made to animal shelters.

title: Domestic violence-revises definition, include psychological & economic abuse
summary: Revises definition of domestic violence to include psychological abuse and economic abuse.

title: Highlands Region Preservation Area municipalities-reduce sales tax
summary: Provides for reduced sales tax imposition on certain sales in certain Highlands Region Preservation Area municipalities.

title: Veterans, disab-qual. for toll rate & motor vehicle registration fee exemptions
summary: Qualifies certain disabled veterans for toll rate exemptions and exemptions from motor vehicle registration fees.

title: Domestic violence, victim-expands definition
summary: Expands definition of victim of domestic violence.

title: Cannabis packaging-codifies cert requirements; estab offense, improperly stored
summary: Codifies certain cannabis packaging requirements; establishes offense for minor gaining access to improperly stored cannabis products.

title: Suicide prevention-require boards of ed adopt policies; DOE, estab model policy
primary_sponsors: Dunn, Aura K.; Flynn, Victoria A.
summary: Requires boards of education to adopt suicide prevention policies and DOE to establish model suicide prevention policy.

title: Student absences, excused-permit for mental or behavioral health reasons
summary: Permits excused student absences for mental or behavioral health reasons.

title: Outdoor education opportunities-direct Comm of Education to develop guidelines
summary: Directs Commissioner of Education to develop guidelines on outdoor education opportunities.

title: Special education & related svcs.-direct St payment of cost for certain students
summary: Provides for direct State payment of cost of special education and related services for certain students.

title: Charitable contribution income tax deduction-allows cert during pub health emerg
summary: Allows gross income tax deduction for charitable contributions to certain New Jersey-based charitable organizations during public health emergency.

summary: Establishes New Jersey State Government and Civil Service Student Internship Program; appropriates $750,000.

summary: Upgrades burglary of a residence as a crime of the second degree; upgrades it to a crime of the first degree if committed while armed.

title: State child tax credit. increase amt.-revises income, age elig.
summary: Increases amount of State child tax credit and revises income and age eligibility criteria.

title: SDA districts-estab criteria & make recommendations on desig, school districts
summary: Directs Commissioner of Education to establish criteria and make recommendations on designation of school districts as SDA districts.

summary: Clarifies that unlawful gifting of marijuana or cannabis is prohibited under "New Jersey Cannabis Regulatory, Enforcement Assistance, and Marketplace Modernization Act."

title: Civics instruction-req 11th grade students complete as part of graduation req.
summary: Requires 11th grade students to complete civics course as part of high school graduation requirements.

title: Work break periods & warehouse conditions of employment-concerns
summary: Concerns work break periods and warehouse conditions of employment.

title: Air pollution reduction/mitigation plans-cert warehouse operators, implement req
summary: Requires certain warehouse operators to implement air pollution reduction and mitigation plans.

title: Veterinarians, large animals-establish loan redemption program
summary: Establishes loan redemption program for certified veterinarians employed as large animal veterinarians in New Jersey.

summary: Provides for regional economic and land use impact report and establishes review processes related to development of certain large warehouses; and requires related real property reassessments.

summary: Provides for reduction in suspended sentence, probation, or parole based on compliance with conditions of sentence; requires report on effect on recidivism.

summary: Requires school districts to provide instruction on interacting with law enforcement as part of New Jersey Student Learning Standards in Social Studies.

summary: Directs Department of Agriculture in consultation with DOE, to establish Internet-based school meals application.*

title: Minorities and women in construction industry-concerns outreach and training
summary: Concerns outreach and training for minorities and women in the construction industry.

title: NJ SHARES-provides for voluntary contributions, taxpayers on income tax returns
summary: Provides for voluntary contributions by taxpayers on gross income tax returns to support NJ SHARES.

title: Safe and Sanitary Rental Housing Act-establishes
summary: Establishes the "Safe and Sanitary Rental Housing Act."

title: New Jersey Eviction Crisis Task Force-establish
summary: Establishes "New Jersey Eviction Crisis Task Force."

title: Expungement eligibility-expands; eliminates cap on number of convictions
summary: Expands expungement eligibility; eliminates cap on number of convictions person may expunge; eliminates limitation on number of times person may be granted expungement.

title: Sensitivity training program-develop for high school athletic directors/coaches
summary: Directs Commissioner of Education to develop sensitivity training program for high school athletic directors, coaches, and sports officials of interscholastic athletic sports programs.

title: High school coaches, employed in school districts-provide employee stability
summary: Establishes measures to provide employment stability for high school coaches employed in school districts.

title: 2020 NJ Burial Assistance Program-establishes; $20M
summary: Establishes "2020 New Jersey Burial Assistance Program;" appropriates $20 million.

title: Lottery tickets-permits validation via Internet, mobile app, or electronic means
summary: Directs State Lottery Commission to permit lottery player to submit and validate lottery claims of $600 or more via Internet, mobile application, or other electronic means.

title: Law enforcement disciplinary records-makes accessible as government record
summary: Makes law enforcement disciplinary records accessible as government record.

summary: Establishes crime of strangulation chokehold.

summary: Establishes that law enforcement officer who chokes another utilizes deadly force.

summary: Prohibits issuance and execution of "no-knock" warrant to be executed at residences.

title: Guaranteed Income Pilot Program-establish in DOLWD for residents of cert. cities
summary: Establishes "Guaranteed Income Pilot Program" in DOLWD for residents of certain cities.

title: Immunity defense, public employees-establishes certain restrictions
summary: Establishes certain restrictions on qualified immunity defense for public employees.

title: Businesses employing ex-offenders-allows CBT and gross income tax credits
summary: Allows corporation business tax and gross income tax credits to businesses employing qualified ex-offenders.

title: Law enforcement use of force policy-req AG to revise; implement certain reforms
summary: Requires Attorney General to revise law enforcement use of force policy; implements certain reforms.

summary: Requires Attorney General to establish model duty-to-intervene policy for law enforcement officers; requires entities that employ law enforcement officers to adopt duty-to-intervene policy.

title: County Government Criminal Justice Reform Admin Fund-increase fees & assessments
summary: Establishes "County Government Criminal Justice Reform Administration Fund"; increases certain fees and assessments.

title: Expungement records, nondisclosure-establish pilot program in Paterson
summary: Establishes pilot program in Paterson authorizing non-disclosure of records of certain expungements.

title: Rent control & rent leveling ordinances-concerning certain exemptions
summary: Removes initial mortgage period on new construction from exemptions to municipal rent control and rent leveling ordinances.

title: Statewide limitation on rent increases-establishes
summary: Establishes Statewide limitation on rent increases.

title: Rent increase limit-allow certain senior citizens to apply
summary: Allows certain senior citizens to apply for rent increase limit.

title: Pest infestation-prohibits certain demolitions without inspection
summary: Prohibits certain demolitions without inspection for pest infestation.

title: Domestic violence Internet registry-creates for public access; increases fines
summary: Creates domestic violence Internet registry for certain public access; mandates counseling and community service and increases fines for certain domestic violence offenders.

title: Driver's license restoration after suspension-clarifies procedures
summary: Clarifies procedures for restoration of driver's license after suspension or revocation; concerns waiver of penalties for operating vehicle while license is suspended or revoked under certain circumstances.

title: Informants, anonymous-requires safeguards for anonymity & confidentiality
summary: Requires safeguards for anonymity and confidentiality with respect to communications presented through phone lines, electronic communication systems, or websites dedicated to accepting anonymous tips for use by law enforcement in criminal investigations.

title: Veterans, rental housing-grants credit against business taxes to developer
summary: Grants credit against business income taxes to developer of rental housing reserved for occupancy by veterans.

title: Racially discriminatory language-Law Revision Comm. identify statutes containing
summary: Requires New Jersey Law Revision Commission to identify statutes containing racially discriminatory language.

title: License plate readers, automated-impose certain requirements on use
summary: Imposes certain requirements on use of automated license plate readers by law enforcement agencies.

title: Michelle Sous' Law-requires a blood sample be obtained in motor vehicle death
summary: Requires blood sample to be obtained from driver involved in motor vehicle accident resulting in death; designated as "Michelle Sous' Law."

title: Cigarettes-increases fines for selling less than 20 in packs and single
summary: Increases fines for selling single cigarettes and cigarettes in packs of less than 20.

title: HOPE Initiative Act-educate citizens on dangers of heroin and opioid addiction
summary: "HOPE Initiative Act;"  requires establishment of public awareness campaign to educate citizens about dangers and causes of, and appropriate responses to, heroin and opioid addiction.

title: Senior citizens & persons w/disabilities-creates crime of victimization
summary: Creates crime of victimization of persons with disabilities and senior citizens.

title: CAFRA permit from DEP-changes types of developments requiring
summary: Changes types of development requiring CAFRA permit from DEP.

title: Auto & homeowners' insurance policies-cancellation notice send by certified mail
summary: Requires notice of cancellation or nonrenewal of automobile and homeowners insurance policies to be sent by certified mail, return receipt requested.

title: Unemployment compensation overpayments-concerns repayment
summary: Concerns repayment of unemployment compensation overpayments.

title: Financial instit., foreclosed property-remove water svc lines that contain lead

title: Resid. prop.-expedite process for foreclosing vacant/abandoned residential prop.
summary: Concerns expedited process for foreclosing vacant and abandoned residential properties in uncontested actions.

title: Employees affected by a declared state of emergency-proh cert employment actions
summary: Prohibits certain employment actions against employees affected by a declared state of emergency.

title: Public util.-maintain billing records, duration of account; overpay full refund
summary: Requires public utilities to maintain customer billing records for duration of account and to refund full amount of any overpayment by customers.

summary: Imposes $0.25 surcharge on alcoholic beverages to be dedicated to Alcohol Education, Rehabilitation and Enforcement Fund.

summary: Requires certain local government community benefit agreements dedicate resources for affordable housing purposes.

title: Grow-your-own prog-estab, support sch dist, hiring teachers of students w/disab
summary: Establishes program in DOE to support school districts in developing grow-your-own programs for hiring of teachers of students with disabilities.

title: School attendance, compulsory-raises age requirement from 16 to 18 years old
summary: Raises age requirement of compulsory school attendance from 16 to 18 years old.

title: Core curriculum content standards-creates advisory council to oversee revision
summary: Creates advisory council to oversee revision of core curriculum content standards.

title: Post-release employment-addresses various concerns
summary: Addresses various concerns affecting post-release employment.

title: St. intervention-elim partial/full under Quality Single Accountability Continuum
summary: Eliminates partial and full State intervention under New Jersey Quality Single Accountability Continuum.

title: Reader Privacy Act-enacts
summary: Enacts the "Reader Privacy Act."

title: Student accident insurance-school districts required to maintain & pay premiums
summary: Requires school districts to maintain and pay premiums for student accident insurance.

title: Gun Court Pilot Program-establishes in Passaic County
summary: Establishes a Gun Court Pilot Program in Passaic County.

title: Minority-Serving State College & University Stabilization Program-establish;$20M
summary: Establishes "Minority-Serving State College and University Stabilization Program" in Office of Secretary of Higher Education; appropriates $20 million.

title: Better Care Dog Act-concerns improved care of dogs
summary: "Better Care Dog Act."

title: Student, homeless-assign finan responsibility of educating to dist of attendance
summary: Assigns financial responsibility of educating homeless student to district of attendance.

title: Parole discharge, parolees sentenced to life imprisonment-requires admin. review
summary: Requires administrative review for purposes of parole discharge of certain parolees sentenced to life imprisonment.

title: TPAF-requires pay for extracurricular activities be included in compensation

summary: Requires pay for extracurricular activities to be included in compensation for TPAF purposes.

summary: Prohibits New Jersey Legislature from solely altering conduct or outcome of any election; reaffirms separation of powers concerning elections.

title: Bus. for certification-prohibits disqual. of certain minority and women owned
summary: Prohibits disqualification of certain minority-owned and women-owned businesses for certification.

title: Safe Haven Homeless Housing Program-establishes;$30M
primary_sponsors: Atkins, Reginald W.; Murphy, Carol A.
summary: Establishes Safe Haven Homeless Housing Program; appropriates $30 million.

title: Recreational sports & STEM programs for children-establish grant program;$10M
summary: Requires Director of Division of Housing and Community Resources in DCA to establish grant program to encourage municipalities to develop recreational sports and STEM programs for children; appropriates $10 million.

title: Residential tenant displacement-estab cert notice & compensation for renovation
summary: Establishes certain notice and compensation requirements for residential tenant displaced for purpose of renovation.

title: Kitchen appliances, various-provide in certain dwelling units offered for rent
summary: Requires landlord to provide various kitchen appliances in certain dwelling units offered for rent.

title: Businesses owned by LGBTQ+ persons-establishes certification program
primary_sponsors: Wimberly, Benjie E.; Stanley, Sterley S.; Guardian, Donald A.

title: Premium payments made by purchasers of tax liens-paid to property owner

summary: Directs DOH to establish food bank for pets pilot program; appropriates $1 million.

title: Division of Food and Nutrition-tranfer from Department of Agriculture to DHS
summary: Transfers Division of Food and Nutrition from Department of Agriculture to DHS.

summary: Requires Commissioner of Education to recommend dates for spring break in school districts.

summary: Adds two student representatives to board of governors of Rutgers University.

title: Digital license plates-authorizes use
summary: Authorizes use of digital license plates.

summary: Concerns motor vehicles overtaking certain pedestrians and persons operating bicycles and personal conveyances.

summary: Establishes Anti-Bullying Youth Council to assist Anti-Bullying Task Force.

summary: Imposes conditions on drivers approaching disabled vehicles.

summary: Eliminates prohibition on provision of single-use paper bags by grocery stores for delivery orders; requires certain retailers to repurpose cardboard boxes if feasible.

title: Optometrists-updates scope of practice
primary_sponsors: Diegnan, Patrick J.; Turner, Shirley K.
summary: Updates scope of practice of optometrists.

title: NJpass Program & GO NJ Transit Card Program-estab, prov discounted fares
summary: Establishes "NJpass Program" to provide discounted fares to eligible organizations; establishes "GO NJ Transit Card Program" to develop transit cards that can be used to purchase any NJT service.

summary: Requires NJT and county transit agencies to offer transit pass for individuals seeking access to One Stop Career Centers.

title: Juvenile defendants-concerns rights, elect to be tried as adults
primary_sponsors: Diegnan, Patrick J.; Polistina, Vincent J.
summary: Concerns rights of juvenile defendants who elect to be tried as adults.

title: Railroad safety-concerns
primary_sponsors: Diegnan, Patrick J.; Johnson, Gordon M.
summary: Concerns railroad safety.

title: Motor vehicle safety recalls-requires notice upon inspection & registration

summary: Requires notice of motor vehicle safety recalls upon registration of motor vehicle; requires motor vehicle manufacturers to pay fee to MVC in certain circumstances.*

title: Paratransit service-modifies definition under various sections of law
summary: Authorizes taxicabs, limousines, and transportation network companies to provide paratransit services for two-year period.*

title: New Jersey Target Zero Commission-establishes
summary: Establishes "New Jersey Target Zero Commission."

title: Playgrounds, completely inclusive-allocate 10% Green Acres funding

title: Fusion-adds to types of Class I renewable energies
summary: Adds fusion to types of Class I renewable energies as defined for purposes of "Electric Discount and Energy Competition Act."

title: Fusion science field-establish scholarship program
summary: Establishes scholarship program for graduate students and postdoctoral researchers in field of fusion science.

title: Fusion energy, technology-eligible for economic incentive program benefits
summary: Provides that fusion energy and fusion technology companies are eligible to receive benefits under certain economic incentive programs.

title: Fusion Technology Industry Promotion Act-program promoting fusion technology
summary: "Fusion Technology Industry Promotion Act"; establishes program to promote fusion technology industry and attract fusion technology businesses.

title: Flood Control, Mitigation, & Prevention Bond Act-bonds up to $2B; approp. $5K
summary: "Flood Control, Mitigation, and Prevention Bond Act"; authorizes bonds for up to $2 billion and appropriates $5,000.

title: Highlands Region Preservation Area municipalities-reduce sales tax
summary: Provides for reduced sales tax imposition on certain sales in certain Highlands Region Preservation Area municipalities.

summary: "Transparency in Government Act;" provides for establishment of State public finance website; requires certain public entities receiving State funds to establish similar website; makes an appropriation.

title: Fed emp classified as crim invest-excl income tax contrib, fed Thrift Savings Fd
summary: Excludes from gross income contributions that certain federal employees classified as criminal investigators make to federal Thrift Savings Fund.

summary: Permits certain applicants to submit personal statement of veteran status, in lieu of determination of veteran status, prior to issuance of civil service eligible list; requires submission of determination of status prior to employment.

summary: Establishes task force to study issues facing returning members of US Armed Forces, NJ National Guard, and reserve component of US Armed Forces; creates permanent commission to study various definitions related to veteran status.

title: Fire safety features-req. bidders on pub works construction projects submit info
summary: Requires bidders on public works construction projects to submit information on fire safety features.

summary: Directs NJ Sports and Exposition Authority to conduct feasibility study of Meadowlands convention center project.

title: Flood Prot. & Home Elevation Fd.-dedicate realty transfer fee rev. $5M annually
summary: Establishes home elevation fund and dedicates up to $5 million of realty transfer fee revenue annually for this purpose.

title: Vaccines-revises requirements for administration to patients
summary: Revises requirements for administration of vaccines to patients.

title: Group home licenses, certain-concerns Medicaid reimbursement
summary: Provides for certain group home licensees to obtain Medicaid reimbursement for reservation of beds used by residents on therapeutic leave.

title: Children's Vaccination Bill of Rights-provides children with certain protections
summary: "Children's Vaccination Bill of Rights"; provides children in State with certain protections concerning vaccines.

title: Ballots, paper-req use during election; req use of open source voting technology
summary: Requires use of paper ballots during conduct of election; requires use of open source voting technology; makes appropriation.

summary: "Pain-Capable Unborn Child Protection Act"; bans abortion 20 weeks or more after fertilization.

summary: Modifies "New Jersey Tort Claims Act" to provide for State to be strictly liable for injuries caused by State-mandated vaccines.

summary: Requires informed consent for breast implant surgery.

summary: Expands audit powers of State Auditor; requires online publication of certain materials; requires performance review audits of certain business incentive programs.

summary: Requires managed care plans to allow any clinical laboratory to participate in provider network.

summary: Eliminates demand side management programs from cost recovery through societal benefits charge.

summary: Exempts expansion or reconstruction, within 125% of existing footprint, of municipal and county buildings and certain emergency services buildings from "Highlands Water Protection and Planning Act."

summary: Imposes moratorium on affordable housing litigation until December 31, 2028.

title: Affordable housing, alternate living arrangement-municipality obtain credit

title: Pension & retirement income exclusion-removes income elig. cap applicable to tax

title: Fusion Technology Industry Commission-establishes
summary: Establishes NJ Fusion Technology Industry Commission.

title: Income tax deduction-provides for membership fees paid to lake associations
summary: Provides gross income tax deductions for membership fees, dam project assessments and potable water system project assessments paid to lake associations.

summary: Requires health insurers to provide coverage for treatment of tick-borne diseases.

title: Unemployment Intake Accountability Pilot Program-creates
summary: Creates "Unemployment Intake Accountability Pilot Program."

summary: Prohibits retail mercantile establishments from requiring certain consumer identification for return of merchandise.

summary: Requires sex offenders in satellite-based monitoring program to pay for certain equipment and monitoring costs.

title: Law enforcement officer, retired-eliminates age restriction to carry handguns
summary: Eliminates age restriction for issuing special permits to carry handgun to retired law enforcement officers.

summary: Encourages wearing blue to honor law enforcement officers on Peace Officers Memorial Day.

summary: Revises method of determining reimbursement costs when a law enforcement entity hires a recently trained officer from another law enforcement entity.

title: Extraordinary special education State aid-provide 3 yr phase-in of full funding
summary: Provides three-year phase-in of full funding of extraordinary special education State aid.

summary: Provides for direct State payment of cost of special education and related services for certain students.

summary: Requires board of education to publicly post full meeting agenda 48 hours prior to meeting.

summary: Modifies rate-regulation over municipal electric utilities.

title: Util authority fees, co or mun-incr income elig limit for reduction or abatement
summary: Increases income eligibility limit for reduction or abatement of municipal or county utility authority fees.

title: Veteran-creates permanent commission to study various statutory definitions
summary: Creates permanent commission to study various statutory definitions of veteran, disabled veteran, and service-disabled veteran.

title: Lake management activities-establishes grant program in DEP;$10M

title: Diversity and inclusion instruction-updates requirements
