title: Menstrual hygiene products-establishes program covering under WIC and SNAP
summary: Establishes program covering menstrual hygiene products under WIC and SNAP.

title: Uniform Electronic Wills Act-authorizes electronic wills

summary: Establishes Office of River Maintenance in DEP; repeals P.L.1993, c.376 concerning stream cleaning activities.

summary: Prohibits adoption of State and local rules that prohibit use of fossil fuel-powered kitchen appliances.

title: Virtual or remote instruction-revise process, meet 180-day school yr requirement
summary: Revises process for use of virtual or remote instruction to meet minimum 180-day school year requirement.

title: Physical education/sport programs-permit students to opt out during Ramadan
summary: Permits public high school students to opt out of physical education and sports programs during Ramadan.

title: Businesses owned by individuals w/ disablities-establish loan program;$5M
summary: Establishes loan program in EDA to assist businesses owned by individuals with disabilities; appropriates $5 million.

title: Disables-owned businesses-establish certification program
summary: Establishes certification program for disabled-owned businesses.

title: Pandemic Bill of Rights for the Welfare of Individuals-establishes
summary: Establishes "New Jersey Pandemic Bill of Rights for the Welfare of Individuals."

summary: Requires Division of Developmental Disabilities to develop guidelines for tiered group home placements and transfers.

title: State Pension Cost of Living Reform Commission-establishes
summary: Establishes State Pension Cost of Living Reform Commission.

title: Animal Abuser Registry-establishes
summary: Establishes NJ Animal Abuser Registry.

title: State sch aid reduction-prev dist that experienced decrease in equalized value

summary: Includes value of certain properties exempt from taxation in valuation used to calculate State school aid.

summary: Establishes mandatory penalties for committing burglary and theft during a state of emergency.

summary: Requires registered voters to present photo ID when voting at polling place.

summary: Prohibits discrimination against individuals who have not received COVID-19 vaccine.

summary: Requires explosive gas detectors to be installed in certain residential properties.

title: Lobsters-changes law regulating size limits
summary: Changes law regulating size limits of lobsters.

title: Pet adoptions-waives certain fees for veterans
summary: Waives certain adoption fees for veterans.

title: Fishing-clarifies license not required at a private community lake
summary: Clarifies that fishing license is not required to fish at private community lake.

summary: Permits short-term tax exemption for certain improvements to dwellings damaged by natural disasters.

summary: Excludes passenger and freight rail projects from purposes for which revenue from increase in petroleum products gross receipts tax revenue may be used.

summary: Requires electric distribution lines to be located underground in areas affected by severe weather or natural disasters.

summary: Provides for court dismissal, with prejudice, of civil actions for which lis pendens notices are filed under certain circumstances.

title: Communications, electronic storage, password prot.-clarify unlawful access crime
summary: Clarifies crime of unlawful access concerning certain password protected communications in electronic storage.

summary: Requires State to lower compensation rate of civilly committed sexually violent predators to same level as State inmates for institutional work.

title: DUI-criminalizes fourth or subsequent offenses
summary: Criminalizes fourth or subsequent drunk driving offenses.

title: Rescue operation of public entity-authorizes court to impose costs
summary: Authorizes court to impose rescue operation costs of public entity under certain circumstances.

title: Jury duty-exempts police
summary: Exempts police from jury duty.

title: Distracted Driver Enforcement and Education Fund-establishes
summary: Establishes "Distracted Driver Enforcement and Education Fund."

title: Commercial vehicle-increase fines for failure to have required markings
summary: Increases fines for failing to have required markings on commercial vehicles.

title: Driver's license, suspended-requires police notification
summary: Requires police notification when driver's license is suspended.

title: Credit card scanners-establish new offenses concerning unlawful possession/use
summary: Establishes new offenses concerning unlawful possession and use of credit card scanners.

title: Internet Criminal Information Registry-establishes
summary: Establishes New Jersey Internet Criminal Information Registry.

title: Pregnant women-establishes training for law enforcement officers interaction
summary: Establishes training for law enforcement officers interacting with pregnant women.

title: State of emerg. essential individuals & businesses-exempt from cert requirements
summary: Exempts certain essential individuals and businesses from certain requirements in state of emergencies or public health emergencies.

title: Affordable housing need/fee-proh imposition upon local transfer or business move
summary: Prohibits the imposition of affordable housing need and related fees upon the local transfer or move of a business.

title: Minors-permits to work until 11 pm between Memorial Day and October 1 of each yr
summary: Permits minors to work until 11 p.m. between Memorial Day and October 1 of each year in certain circumstances.

title: Polysomnography license fees-revises
summary: Revises polysomnography license fees.

title: Business immunity, COVID-19 related-establish against claims for exposure
summary: Establishes immunity for businesses against damage claims for COVID-19 exposure; excludes reckless or intentional conduct.

title: Thefts, unlawful taking-upgrades crime in certain instances
summary: Upgrades unlawful taking thefts in certain instances.

title: Municipal agencies & certain land use applications-prohibits default approvals
summary: Prohibits default approvals of certain municipal land use applications, and permits municipal agencies to not hold certain required meetings, under emergency circumstances.

title: Jersey Shore Safety & Economy Task Force-establishes
summary: Establishes Jersey Shore Safety and Economy Task Force.

title: Military family members, certain-employ, provides CBT and income tax credit

summary: Provides corporation business tax and gross income tax credits for employing immediate family members of members of the Armed Forces of the United States who were killed in action.

title: School pupil transportation pilot program in Ocean County-establishes 3 year

title: St aid reduction-concerns accumulated absences paid to employees upon retirement
summary: Requires State aid reduction to municipalities and school districts by amount of accumulated absences paid to employees upon their retirement.

title: Street paving costs, qualified private communities-mun. required to reimburse
summary: Requires municipalities to reimburse qualified private communities for street paving costs.

summary: Requires installation of emergency power supply systems to certain common areas of new planned real estate developments; provides related tax incentives.

summary: Authorizes payment of just compensation to businesses for losses due to public health emergency closures.

title: Electric pub. utility, sustained svc. outage-reimb cost of spoiled food/medicine

title: Juror compensation-establishes $40 daily pay rate
summary: Establishes $40 daily pay rate for jurors.

title: School library, public-req. to post on website list of all resources available

title: COVID-19 testing requirement for unvaccinated State employee-eliminates

summary: Eliminates weekly COVID-19 testing requirement for unvaccinated State employees.

title: TikTok application-prohibit download/use of on State-issued electronic device
summary: Prohibits download or use of TikTok application on any State-issued electronic device.

title: Beach replenishment project, Ocean County-approp $4M to DEP for local cost share
summary: Appropriates $4 million to DEP for local cost share of certain beach replenishment project in Ocean County.

title: Board of Ed, members-req to attend meetings in person to be recorded as present
summary: Requires members of State Board of Education to attend meetings in person to be recorded as present.

title: Criminal mischief-upgrade offense if person interrupts or impairs power supply

title: Automobile insurance coverage-increase amounts for persons convicted of DWI

title: Civil penalties-prohibits imposition on State agencies by State agencies
summary: Prohibits imposition of civil penalties on State agencies by State agencies.

title: Registered ticket brokers, all-display list on division's website

title: Tickets not in reseller's possession-prohibits sale

summary: Provides gross income tax deduction for E-ZPass tolls paid.

title: Sr citizen & disabled person prop tax deduction-incr amount of income limit elig

title: S corporations-eliminates minimum CBT

title: Income tax rates-reduce by 10% over 3 years
summary: Reduces gross income tax rates by ten percent over three years.

title: Life insurance-requires notice prior to lapse due to nonpayment of premium
summary: Requires notice prior to lapse of life insurance policy due to nonpayment of premium.

title: Private wildlife habitat certification program-DEP establish
summary: Requires DEP to establish "private wildlife habitat certification program"; creates affirmative defense against municipal nuisance ordinances for properties certified under the program.

title: Bus. out-migration, formation and employment-study impact of St bus income taxes
summary: Requires Director of Division of Taxation to study impact of State business income taxes on business out-migration, business formation, and employment.

title: Governor and legislative leaders-meet quarterly
summary: Requires Governor and legislative leaders to meet together quarterly.

title: Respect for Physicians Act-prompt response for prior auth. for health services
summary: "New Jersey Respect for Physicians Act;" requires prompt response by insurers to requests for prior authorization of health care services.

title: DUI accident-provides that limitation on lawsuit option does not apply
summary: Provides that limitation on lawsuit option does not apply in accident caused by drunk driver.

title: Affordable housing-reforms procedures; repeal Statewide Non-Resid. Devel Fee Act
summary: Reforms procedures concerning provision of affordable housing; repeals "Statewide Non-Residential Development Fee Act."

title: Trans. capital proj. & infra safety inspection-cont, failure to enact approp law
summary: Requires transportation capital project and infrastructure safety inspections to continue if emergency is declared due to failure to enact general appropriation law as prescribed by State Constitution.

title: Health Insurance Claim Plain Language and Simplification Act-concerns
primary_sponsors: Bramnick, Jon M.; Bucco, Anthony M.
summary: "Health Insurance Claim Plain Language and Simplification Act."

title: Realty transfer fees-eliminates general purpose, supplemental and mansion
summary: Eliminates general purpose, supplemental and mansion realty transfer fees.

title: Telephone operator-concerns options when calling government entities
summary: Allows person calling certain State or local government entities to have option of speaking or leaving a recorded message with a human telephone operator during normal business hours.

title: Public hearings during declarations-req. Gov. hold under Emerg Health Powers Act
summary: Requires Governor hold public hearings during declarations under Emergency Health Powers Act.

title: Multiple employer welfare arrangements, self-funded-prov compensation to members
summary: Requires DOBI to provide compensation to members of self-funded multiple employer welfare arrangements under certain circumstances.

title: General liability insur, commercial-notify of exclusion for communicable disease
summary: Requires insurers offering commercial general liability insurance policies to provide notification of exclusion for communicable disease.

title: Dog injures person-estab. disorderly persons offense, failing to remain at scene
summary: Establishes disorderly persons offense for dog owner who fails to remain at scene and provide certain information when dog injures a person.

title: Self-service storage facility-concerns occupant access to personal property
summary: Restricts manner in which self-service storage facility owner is permitted to deny occupant access to personal property.

title: Cell phone or mobile device-upgrade stalking crime, use location monitoring prog
summary: Upgrades crime of stalking when stalking activity is carried out or assisted by installation or use of communication or location monitoring program or device on cellular phone or wireless mobile device.

title: Gov., Lieutenant Gov., Senate & General Assembly-disclose fed. income tax return
summary: Requires candidates for Governor, Lieutenant Governor, State Senate, and General Assembly to disclose federal income tax returns.

title: Legislature-provides for public comment period at cert session of each house
primary_sponsors: Bramnick, Jon M.; Sarlo, Paul A.
summary: Provides for public comment period at certain sessions of each house of the Legislature.

title: Annual approp., failure to enact-impose a daily fine of $250 for each leg.
summary: Imposes daily fine of $250 upon each member of Legislature during state of emergency due to failure to enact annual appropriations law.

title: SPRS-raises mandatory retirement age from 55 to 60
summary: Raises mandatory retirement age for SPRS members from 55 to 60.

title: Council of the Arts-grants awarded.scheduling courses when school dist is closed
summary: Prohibits entity that receives grant from New Jersey State Council on Arts from scheduling educational courses on days when local school district is closed for religious holiday.

title: Governor & Legislative memb-expends deadline,  filing finan disclosure statement
summary: Expands deadline for filing financial disclosure statements by candidates for Governor and member of Legislature.

title: Motor vehicle tracking device-makes it a fourth degree crime
primary_sponsors: Bramnick, Jon M.; Cryan, Joseph P.
summary: Makes it a fourth degree crime to engage in certain tracking and location activities.

title: Bias intimidation-elim provision, victims perception of defendants purpose
summary: Eliminates provision in bias intimidation statute concerning victim's perception of defendant's purpose; replaces provision with language concerning a "reasonable" victim.

title: Municipal administrator salary-withhold if removed immediately for good cause
summary: Provides for payment of balance of salary to municipal administrator to be withheld if removed immediately for "good cause."

title: Board of education-accept donations for purpose of providing property tax relief
summary: Permits board of education to accept donations for purpose of providing property tax relief.

title: Retirement income exclusion under gross income tax-concerns person w/cert income
summary: Provides retirement income exclusion under gross income tax for certain persons with income over $3,000 from part-time employment.

title: Education and employment-credit against income tax for pursuing in State
summary: Allows credit against gross income tax for certain eligible taxpayers pursuing education and employment in State.

title: Vehicles, donated-provides gross income tax deduction
summary: Provides gross income tax deduction for certain donated vehicles.

title: Residential real property between family members-exempts from inheritance tax
summary: Exempts transfers of residential real property between family members from inheritance tax.

title: Liability insurance policies-prohibit certain provisions
summary: Prohibits certain provisions in liability insurance policies.

title: Golf caddies-classify as independent contractors for purpose of State emp. laws
summary: Classifies golf caddies as independent contractors for purposes of State employment laws.

title: Prenatal ultrasound screenings-prohibits pre-approval covered under health plans
summary: Prohibits pre-approval or precertification of prenatal ultrasound screenings covered under health benefits plans.

title: Blue painted between yellow lines-authorize Commissioner of Transportation allow
primary_sponsors: Bramnick, Jon M.; Corrado, Kristin M.
summary: Authorizes Commissioner of Transportation to allow painting of blue line between double yellow centerline marking on public roads.

title: State Auditor-expands duties to include performance audits at request of Leg.
summary: Expands duties of State Auditor to include performance audits at request of legislator; establishes Performance Audit Committee, consisting of eight public members, to help conduct performance audits.

title: Police, mun-make arrests for any disorderly person outside their territorial mun
summary: Permits municipal police officers to make arrests for any disorderly persons or petty disorderly persons offense outside the territorial limits of their municipality.

title: Military monument desecration-crime of third degree
primary_sponsors: Bramnick, Jon M.; Corrado, Kristin M.
summary: Makes desecration of a military monument a crime of the third degree.

title: Firearm theft-increases statute of limitations for prosecution
summary: Increases statute of limitations for prosecution of theft of firearm.

title: Aggressive driving pattern-creates new motor vehicle offense
summary: Creates new motor vehicle offense of engaging in a pattern of aggressive driving.

title: Threats against prosecutors, law enforcement officers-second degree crime
summary: Establishes threats of violence against prosecutors, law enforcement officers and their family members as a second degree crime, subject to the No Early Release Act sentencing.

title: Phishing or soliciting-prohibits for personal identifying information
summary: Prohibits soliciting or phishing for personal identifying information.

title: One-time alert on personal wireless devices-law enforcement officers receive
summary: Allows law enforcement officers to receive one-time emergency alerts on personal wireless communication devices.

title: Volunteer fire companies and fire departments-exempt from OPRA
summary: Exempts certain volunteer fire companies and volunteer fire departments from open public records act.

title: Veterans, civil service purpose-define vet./disabled vet under fed/St definition
summary: Permits veterans, for civil service purposes, to be defined as a veteran or disabled veteran under federal or State definition of veteran.

title: Legislature-authorizes member to solemnize marriages and civil unions
summary: Authorizes members of the New Jersey State Legislature to solemnize marriages and civil unions.

title: Terrorism-immunity from civil liab to persons reporting info concerning crimes
summary: Grants immunity from civil liability to persons reporting information concerning crimes related to terrorism.

title: Public utility employee-disorderly persons offense for misrepresentation
summary: Creates disorderly persons offense of purporting to be public utility employee to gain access to residence.

title: School board member, participate in volunteer activities-clarifies circumstances
summary: Clarifies circumstances in which school board member may participate in volunteer activities.

title: Safe school resource off/Class Three special law enforcement off-sch dist employ
summary: Permits school districts to employ safe schools resource officers or Class Three special law enforcement officers for security purposes, and requires school districts to have agreement with local law enforcement governing placement of school security personnel.

title: Anti-bullying policy of public schools-extends time for investigation incident
summary: Requires anti-bullying policy of public schools to include provision requiring principal to make preliminary determination and meet with parents of students involved in alleged bullying incident for that determination; extends time for investigating incident.

title: Military member-may qualify for residential tuition rate at county colleges
summary: Allows military member to qualify for resident tuition rate at county college.

title: Anti-bullying policies-mandate additional requirements, expand info DOE guidance
summary: Mandates additional requirements for anti-bullying policies of public schools, expands information provided in DOE guidance document on bullying, and requires parents be provided clear explanation of student rights in school bullying investigations.

title: State Office of Consumer, independent-establishes
primary_sponsors: Bramnick, Jon M.; Bucco, Anthony M.
summary: Establishes independent State Office of Consumer.

title: Flood control projects in Cranford Township;$5M
summary: Appropriates $5 million to Cranford Township for flood control projects.

title: Animals, wild-establish offense of reckless trespass involving; estab. penalties
summary: Establishes offense of reckless trespass involving wild animals; establishes penalties; establishes liability for resulting harm to wild animal.

title: Gang shoplifting-establishes crime
primary_sponsors: Bramnick, Jon M.; Bucco, Anthony M.; Stack, Brian P.
summary: Establishes crime of gang shoplifting.

title: Motorcycle road test-requires MVC waiver for certain veterans
summary: Requires MVC waiver of motorcycle road test for certain veterans.

title: Mental Health Awareness license plates-authorize creation and issuance
summary: Authorizes creation of Mental Health Awareness license plates.

title: Motor vehicle accident reports-restricts access under certain circumstances
summary: Restricts access to motor vehicle accident reports under certain circumstances.

title: Insurance issues-create office to advocate for consumers
summary: Creates office to advocate for consumers on insurance issues.

title: Caller identification service manipulation, cert-proh; make fourth degree crime
summary: Prohibits certain caller identification service manipulation; makes violation fourth degree crime.

title: Bridges and railways overpasses, cert-allow municipalities to advertise for free
summary: Allows municipalities to advertise for free on certain bridges and railways overpasses.

title: Firearm registry-allow people prohibited from owning a firearm include name
summary: Establishes registry allowing persons to voluntarily include their names on list of individuals prohibited from owning firearm.

title: Retired judges-practice law while receiving pension or retirement allowance
summary: Permits retired judges to practice law while receiving pension or retirement allowance.

title: Gang assult-establishes third degree crime
primary_sponsors: Bramnick, Jon M.; Polistina, Vincent J.
summary: Establishes third degree crime of gang assault.

title: Items possessed by incarcerated persons-upgrades penalties, unlawful possession
summary: Upgrades penalties for unlawful possession of certain items by incarcerated persons and unlawful provision of certain items to incarcerated persons.

title: Health insurance claims-prohibits downcoding
summary: Prohibits downcoding in health insurance claims.

title: Age-restricted community-restrict occupancy of unit to older adults after resale
summary: Restricts occupancy of dwelling unit in age-restricted community to older adults following resale.

title: Public utilities-required to mail customers detailed rate settlement agreements
summary: Requires public utilities to mail customers detailed explanation of rate settlement agreements prior to final BPU vote.

title: Public utilities-provide customers notice of request for increase in rates
summary: Requires public utilities to provide customers notice of request for increase in rates; revises requirements related to hearings on proposed rate increases.

title: Military, active duty-allows $250 gross income tax deduction
summary: Allows $250 gross income tax deduction for members of military on active duty.

title: Credit card usage during state of emergency-concerns certain fees
summary: Concerns certain fees for credit card usage during state of emergency.

title: Volunteer First Responders Loan Redemption-estab. in Higher Ed Student Asst Auth
summary: Establishes Volunteer First Responders Loan Redemption Program in Higher Education Student Assistance Authority.

title: PFRS, death benefit eligibility-req enrollment be retroactive, first date of emp
summary: Requires PFRS enrollment to be retroactive to first date of employment for death benefit eligibility.

title: Opioid antidote-school nurse administer to overdose victims on school property
summary: Authorizes school nurses to administer opioid antidotes to overdose victims on school property, with immunity from civil, criminal, and professional liability, pursuant to "Overdose Prevention Act."

title: Farm employers-CBT & gross income tax credit, provide lodging & trans. benefits
summary: Provides corporation business tax credits and gross income tax credits to farm employers for providing lodging or transportation benefits.

title: Small business & farm employers-provide tax credits, State min. wage  increase
summary: Provides corporation business tax credits and gross income tax credits to small business employers and farm employers related to increase in State minimum wage.

title: Small business & farm employer-CBT & income tax cred, mandatory employer contrib
summary: Provides corporation business tax credits and gross income tax credits to small business employers and farm employers for increases in certain mandatory employer contributions.

title: Realty transfer fee-exempts surviving spouses, civil union partners & disab vets
summary: Exempts certain surviving spouses and surviving civil union partners of certain disabled veterans from components of the realty transfer fee.

title: Transportation network company driver-pretending, fraudulent, criminalizes
summary: Criminalizes fraudulently pretending to be transportation network company driver.

title: Whistleblower-extends protections to employee disclosure of govt. mismanagement
summary: Extends "whistleblower" protections to employee disclosure of governmental mismanagement, waste and abuse.

title: Farmland not redevelopment/rehab area-provide under Local Redevel & Housing Law
summary: Excludes farmland from definitions of "redevelopment area" and "rehabilitation area" in "Local Redevelopment and Housing Law."

title: Emergency Services Assistance Grant Program-establishes;$10M
summary: Establishes Emergency Services Assistance Grant Program in DOH; appropriates $10 million.

title: Domestic violence-related assault-upgades under certain circumstances
summary: Upgrades domestic violence-related assault under certain circumstances.

title: Firearm purch ID card-priority when domestic viol restraining order is in effect
summary: Gives priority to applicants for firearms purchaser identification card and permits to purchase handguns when domestic violence restraining order is in effect.

title: S. Jersey Vietnam Vets' Assc-auth lic plate; proceeds, vet, emerg mgmt operation
summary: Authorizes South Jersey Vietnam Veterans' Association license plates with proceeds to veterans' and emergency management operations.

title: Sex offenders-required annual review to determine if they registered and tiered
summary: Requires annual review of all released sex offenders to determine if they were registered and tiered.

title: Veterinarian expenses-provides income tax deduction for
summary: Provides a gross income tax deduction for veterinarian expenses.

title: Homestead property tax reimb prog-lowers age of eligibility for surviving spouse
summary: Lowers age of eligibility for surviving spouse under homestead property tax reimbursement program.

title: Controlled Dangerous Substances Act-add illicit fentanyls to Schedule 1
summary: Adds illicit fentanyls to Schedule I in the "New Jersey Controlled Dangerous Substances Act."

title: Bd of Ed of limited purpose regional sch dist memb vacancy-fill by majority vote
summary: Provides that in certain cases vacancy in membership of board of education of limited purpose regional school district will be filled by majority vote of board of education of constituent district represented by former board member.

title: Inheritance taxes transfer on brother and sister of decedent-eliminates
summary: Eliminates transfer inheritance taxes on brothers and sisters of a decedent.

title: Volunteer firefighter, rescue & first aid member-claim $500 income tax deduction
summary: Allows certain volunteer firefighters, rescue and first aid squad members to claim $500 income tax deduction.

title: Bereavement-provides paid leave for
summary: Concerns bereavement leave for miscarriage and stillbirth.

title: Driver licences, commercial-establishes young driver program
summary: Establishes young driver program for commercial driver licences.

title: Firearm trans-reasonableness standard for persons who deviate from travel course
summary: Establishes reasonableness standard for persons lawfully transporting firearm who deviate from course of travel.

title: Veteran, psych fac-excludes benefits from calculation of financial obligations
summary: Excludes veterans' benefits from calculation of financial obligation for care at psychiatric facility.

title: Driver license, commercial-auth use of 3rd-party vendors in admin of testing
summary: Requires MVC to authorize use of third-party vendors in administration of commercial driver license testing.

title: New Farmers Improvement Grant Prog-establish and provide matching grants
summary: Establishes "New Farmers Improvement Grant Program" to provide matching grants for farm improvements to beginning farmers.

title: Military comp. from military personnel serving outside of St.-exempts income tax
summary: Excludes military compensation of military personnel serving outside of this State from gross income tax.

title: Employment in positions involving children, State-concerns requirements
summary: Requires State employer to ascertain child abuse or sexual misconduct in employment applications for certain positions involving children; requires background checks for current and prospective employees.

title: Restaurant owner-provide tax credits, offset increase in State minimum wage rate
summary: Provides tax credits to restaurant owners to offset increase in State minimum wage rate.

title: Forest stewardship plans-require grants to local govt units cover total cost
summary: Requires grants to local government units to cover total cost of forest stewardship plans; provides for allocation of funding from "Global Warming Solutions Fund".

title: Parks and forests, State-DEP reimburse local units, responding to emergencies
summary: Requires DEP to reimburse local units for costs incurred in responding to emergencies in State parks and forests.

title: Supermarkets with dedicated displays for Jersey Fresh product-allows tax credits
summary: Allows tax credits for supermarkets with dedicated displays for Jersey Fresh products.

title: School employees, public-eliminate requirement to maintain State residency
summary: Eliminates requirement for public school employees to maintain State residency.

title: Counseling Compact-enters New Jersey into
summary: Enters New Jersey into Counseling Compact.

title: Education, State Board-require meetings to be accessible virtually & in person
summary: Requires State Board of Education meetings to be accessible virtually and in person.

title: Counselor licensure, prof.-reduce amt. of supervised counseling experience req.
summary: Reduces amount of supervised counseling experience required for professional counselor licensure.

title: Riding of steer & other pack animals-auth in St park where horseback permitted
summary: Authorizes riding of steer and other pack animals designated by DEP in any State park where horseback riding is permitted.

title: Legislature Youth Council-reduce residency req. for certain military children
summary: Reduces NJ Legislature Youth Council residency requirement for certain military children from 15 years to 6 months.

title: Animal shelters-allow gross income tax deduction for donations
summary: Allows gross income tax deduction for charitable contributions made to animal shelters.

title: Farm income averaging credit-permits under the NJ gross income tax
summary: Permits farm income averaging credit under the New Jersey gross income tax.

title: Agriculture, community supported-take various actions to publicize & promote
summary: Requires Department of Agriculture to take various actions to publicize and promote community supported agriculture in New Jersey.

title: Historical projects-promote on website and collect donations for projects
summary: Authorizes NJ Historical Commission to establish program to promote developing historic projects on website and collect donations for projects on behalf of historic site or organization.

title: Veterans, surviving spouse-allows income tax deduction
summary: Allows gross income tax deduction for surviving spouses of certain veterans.

title: Devel disab & mental illness-estab 5-yr pilot prog, coordinated provision of svc
summary: Requires DHS to establish five-year pilot program to facilitate coordinated provision of systemic, therapeutic, assessment, resource, and treatment (START) services to adults who have both developmental disabilities and mental illness.

title: Property tax refunds-increase allowed amount & cert cancellations authorized
summary: Increases allowed amount of property tax refunds and certain cancellations that can be authorized without further action of municipal governing body.

title: Foreclosure of certain tax liens on real property-concerns
summary: Concerns foreclosure of certain tax liens on real property.

title: Medicaid reimbursement rate change on nursing homes-estab comm to study impact
primary_sponsors: Singer, Robert W.; Diegnan, Patrick J.
summary: Establishes commission to study impact of certain Medicaid reimbursement rate change on nursing homes.

title: School student w/severe allergies-require devel. of individualized care plan
summary: Requires under certain circumstances development by certified school nurse of  individualized health care plan and individualized emergency health care plan for student with life-threatening allergies or anaphylaxis.

title: Mold Safe Housing Act-creates
primary_sponsors: Singer, Robert W.; Greenstein, Linda R.
summary: Creates the "Mold Safe Housing Act."

title: Leaving scene of accident resulting in serious bodily injury-mand. imprisonment
summary: Requires mandatory minimum term of imprisonment for leaving scene of accident resulting in serious bodily injury.

title: School buses equipped with GPS-establish pilot program
summary: Establishes pilot program in which certain selected school districts equip school buses with global positioning systems and DOE develops school bus tracking application.

title: Riot & disorderly conduct-broadens offense; enhance penal., monument destruction
summary: Broadens offenses of riot and disorderly conduct; enhances penalties for public monument destruction; addresses riot victim assaults; creates crime of promotion of violent, disorderly assembly.

title: Devel disab persons, 21 yr & older-allow to attend spec ed, adult day & emp prog
primary_sponsors: Singer, Robert W.; McKnight, Angela V.
summary: Allows certain persons with developmental disabilities 21 years of age and older to simultaneously participate in adult day and employment programs.*

title: Bail-clarifies court's discretion in imposing monetary conditions
primary_sponsors: Singer, Robert W.; Testa, Michael L.
summary: Clarifies court's discretion in imposing monetary conditions of bail; establishes rebuttable presumption that person charged with violent crime be detained prior to trial.

title: Property tax appeals, third-party-prohibits
summary: Prohibits certain third-party property tax appeals.

title: Infant fatalities, resulting from vaccinations-provides ID and study
summary: Provides for identification and study of infant fatalities and near fatalities resulting from vaccination; requires inclusion of vaccination information in sudden infant death reports; and requires use of federal infant death reporting form.

title: Children's Vaccine Adverse Event Reporting System-establishes
summary: Establishes Children's Vaccine Adverse Event Reporting System.

title: NJWELL program-requires State Health Benefits Comm. advertise & annually review
summary: Requires State Health Benefits Commission advertise and annually review NJWELL program.

title: COVID-19 Review Task Force-establish to study impact and response
summary: Establishes task force to study the impact of and response to COVID-19 pandemic in New Jersey.

title: Criminal mischief-upgrades, damages school bus operation in presence of child
summary: Upgrades offense of criminal mischief if person damages or impairs operation of school bus in the presence of child under age 16.

title: Maternity care-create best practices manual;$950K
summary: Requires DOH to create best practices manual for maternity care; appropriates $950,000.

title: Textbook purchase-eliminates requirement to submit sales tax exemption
summary: Eliminates requirement to submit sales tax exemption form for textbook purchases.

title: Autism spectrum disorder-establish certification card for diagnosed individuals
summary: Establishes certification card for individuals diagnosed with autism spectrum disorder.

title: Cigarette & tobacco products tax rev-incr amount prov to Comm on Cancer Research
primary_sponsors: Singer, Robert W.; Bucco, Anthony M.
summary: Increases amount of cigarette and other tobacco products tax revenues provided to New Jersey Commission on Cancer Research to $10 million; establishes dedicated, non-lapsing Cancer Research Fund.

title: Prof lic/application fees-concerns spouse/dependent of active duty servicemember
primary_sponsors: Singer, Robert W.; Cryan, Joseph P.
summary: Concerns professional licensing and application fees for spouse or dependent of active duty member of United States Armed Forces.

title: Virtual Currency & Blockchain Regulation Act-establishes regulatory framework
summary: "Virtual Currency and Blockchain Regulation Act."

title: Students, grade 11 & 12-require info on free application for federal student aid
summary: Requires school districts to provide information on free application for federal student aid to students in grades 11 and 12.

title: Medicaid reimbursement for certain behavioral health & addiction svcs.-increases
summary: Increases Medicaid reimbursement for in-person partial care and intensive outpatient behavioral health and substance use disorder treatment services, and associated transportation services, for adults.

title: Medicaid reimb.-extends COVID-19 Medicaid per diem rate; concerns cert. coverage
summary: Extends COVID-19 Medicaid per diem rate, and requires Medicaid coverage without prior authorization, for certain partial care behavioral health and substance use disorder treatment services.

title: School bus drivers-auth. schools to administer commercial driver license exam
summary: Authorizes schools to administer commercial driver license exam and other motor vehicle services for school bus drivers.

title: Graduation req., high sch.-req student complete free application for student aid
summary: Requires students to complete free application for federal student aid as part of high school graduation requirements or request an exemption.

title: Anti-Semitism-establishes State definition
primary_sponsors: Singer, Robert W.; Testa, Michael L.
summary: Establishes State definition of anti-Semitism.

title: Developmental disabilities-transfers certain individuals from DHS to DCF
summary: Transfers administration of programs for certain individuals with developmental disabilities from DHS to DCF.

title: Birthing facilities-exempt from cert health care practioner referral restriction
summary: Exempts birthing facilities from certain health care practitioners referral restrictions.

title: Adult day care centers-req to provide reasonable accommodations for cert persons
summary: Requires adult day care centers to provide reasonable accommodations for certain persons.

title: Sandhill Indian Tribe-provides State recognition for certain limited purposes
summary: Provides State recognition of Sandhill Indian Tribe for certain limited purposes.

title: Cannabis-permit employers to prohibit use by certain employees
summary: Permits employers to prohibit use of cannabis by certain employees.

title: No Patient Left Alone Act-estab; policies guaranteeing visitation rights
primary_sponsors: Singer, Robert W.; Corrado, Kristin M.
summary: Establishes "New Jersey No Patient Left Alone Act"; requires certain facilities to establish policies guaranteeing visitation rights for facility residents.

title: Water safety-prov instruction as Student Learning, Comprehensive Health & Phy Ed
primary_sponsors: Singer, Robert W.; Bucco, Anthony M.
summary: Requires school districts to provide instruction on water safety as part of New Jersey Student Learning Standards for Comprehensive Health and Physical Education.

title: Planning and zoning board members-satisfy training requirements on the Internet
primary_sponsors: Singer, Robert W.; Cruz-Perez, Nilsa I.
summary: Allows planning and zoning board members to satisfy training requirements on Internet.

title: Solar panels installed in single-family home-concerns disclosure of information
summary: Requires certain disclosures when single-family homes with solar panels installed are sold.

title: Audiology & Speech-Language Pathology Interstate Compact-enters into
primary_sponsors: Singer, Robert W.; Vitale, Joseph F.
summary: Enters New Jersey into Audiology and Speech-Language Pathology Interstate Compact.

title: Carjacking-req. court to impose monetary bail; req. juvenile be tried as adult
summary: Requires court to impose monetary bail for carjacking; requires juvenile alleged to have committed carjacking be tried as adult.

title: Telecommunications & Internet service providers-terminate service contracts
primary_sponsors: Singer, Robert W.; Diegnan, Patrick J.; Tully, Chris
summary: Requires telecommunications, cable television, and Internet service providers to allow for service contracts to be paused or canceled following service recipients's admission to long-term care facility.*

title: Consumer Freedom From Unwanted Expense in Health Insurance Coverage Act
summary: "Consumer Freedom From Unwanted Expense in Health Insurance Coverage Act."

title: Common interest community property transfer, certain-prohibit penalizing members
summary: Prohibits common interest communities from penalizing members who place unit into living, revocable trust fund or classifying placement as title transfer.

title: John Tarantino Highway-designate portion of Highway 71
summary: Designates portion of State Highway Route 71 as "John Tarantino Highway."

title: Cosmetology & hairstyling lic-allow teaching experience considered for out-of-st
summary: Allows teaching experience to be considered for out-of-State individuals seeking licensure from New Jersey State Board of Cosmetology and Hairstyling.

title: Irritable Bowel Disease/Syndrome, Crohn's disease-concerns parking privilege
summary: Allows persons diagnosed with Irritable Bowel Disease, Irritable Bowel Syndrome, or Crohn's disease to receive parking privileges reserved for persons with disability.

title: Adult day care center/group home, cert-concerns, violate food restriction policy
summary: Permits certain adult day care centers and group homes to restrict access to certain persons who violate food restriction policies.

title: Barber service-concerns licensure of persons rendering services in another state
summary: Concerns licensure of persons rendering barbering services in another state or foreign country.

title: Security categorical aid-permit public/nonpublic school utilize, hire security
primary_sponsors: Singer, Robert W.; Bucco, Anthony M.
summary: Permits public and nonpublic schools to utilize security categorical aid to hire school security personnel.

title: Ovulation enhancing drugs/medical svc-req Medicaid coverage, cert beneficiaries
summary: Requires Medicaid coverage for ovulation enhancing drugs and medical services related to administering such drugs for certain beneficiaries experiencing infertility.

title: Persons with disabilities, certain-establish one-year pilot program; approp$85K
primary_sponsors: Singer, Robert W.; Turner, Shirley K.
summary: Establishes one-year pilot program for certain persons with disabilities; appropriates up to $85,000.

title: High school students, eligible-permit to take certain courses at county college
summary: Permits eligible high school students to take certain courses at county college.

title: Urine drug screenings-require hospital to include test for fentanyl
summary: Requires hospital urine drug screenings to include test for fentanyl.

title: Wine, certain-allow production and sale on premises of religious institutions
summary: Allows production of certain religious wine and sale on premises of religious institutions.

title: Community College Opportunity Grant Prog-expand, include career/tech ed programs
summary: Expands Community College Opportunity Grant Program to include career and technical education programs at county colleges and county vocational schools.

title: Development easements-estab program, acquisition on privately-owned woodlands
primary_sponsors: Singer, Robert W.; Burzichelli, John J.; Kean, Sean T.
summary: Establishes program in SADC for acquisition of development easements on privately-owned woodlands.*

title: Obstetric Discrim Prevention & Mitigation Pilot Program-require DOH to establish
primary_sponsors: Singer, Robert W.; Burgess, Renee C.
summary: Requires DHS to establish three-year Obstetric Discrimination Prevention and Mitigation Pilot Program.*

title: Maternity care facilities-requires DOH to establish levels of maternity care
primary_sponsors: Singer, Robert W.; Burgess, Renee C.
summary: Requires DOH to establish levels of maternity care at maternity care facilities.

title: Dentist and Dental Hygienist Compact-adopts
primary_sponsors: Singer, Robert W.; Vitale, Joseph F.
summary: Adopts Dentist and Dental Hygienist Compact.

title: Freehold Regional School District-provide additional State school aid;$3.5M
summary: Makes supplemental appropriation of $3.5 million to provide additional State school aid to Freehold Regional School District.

title: Veterans, certain-municipality provide free beach access
summary: Requires municipality to provide free beach access to certain veterans.

title: Israel Evacuation Reimbursement Fund-establish; appropriates $2M
summary: Establishes Israel Evacuation Reimbursement Fund; appropriates $2 million.

title: Euthanasia of animals-authorize to tranfer ownership rather than euthanizing
summary: Authorizes veterinarians to transfer ownership of animals rather than euthanizing them, under certain circumstances.

title: Body worn cameras-requires campus police officers wear
summary: Requires campus police officers to wear body worn cameras.

summary: Indexes amount of veterans' income tax exemption for inflation.

summary: Makes FY2024 supplemental appropriation of $17 million for grants for certain lake management activities for recreation and conservation purposes.

title: Electric utilities, municipal-exempt from regulation by BPU
primary_sponsors: Bucco, Anthony M.; Pennacchio, Joseph; Barranco, Christian E.
summary: Exempts municipal electric utilities from regulation by BPU in certain circumstances.*

summary: Permits conduct of Queen of Hearts raffle games.

title: Domestic violence, victim-expands definition
summary: Expands definition of victim of domestic violence.

title: Affordable housing obligations-clarifies scope

summary: Requires NJT to equip trains with defibrillators.

summary: Establishes protections from abusive and controlling litigation for victims of domestic violence.

summary: Provides for establishment of child support lien against life insurance proceeds; requires insurers perform child support judgment search.

title: Medical information of children-proh reporting without consent, parent/guardian
summary: Prohibits reporting medical information of children without consent of parent or legal guardian.

title: Managed Long Term Services & Supports-maintain private duty nursing hours
summary: Provides for certain pediatric NJ FamilyCare beneficiaries to maintain private duty nursing hours when transitioning to Managed Long Term Services and Supports; codifies and expands appeals provisions for private duty nursing services.

title: Veteran, homeless shelters-establish grant program
summary: Establishes grant program for homeless veterans shelters.

title: Supportive Technology for Individuals with Developmental Disabilities Task Force
primary_sponsors: Corrado, Kristin M.; Bucco, Anthony M.
summary: Establishes "Task Force on Supportive Technology for Individuals with Developmental Disabilities."

title: Domestic violence & sexual assault-estab minimum level of training for judges
primary_sponsors: Corrado, Kristin M.; Greenstein, Linda R.
summary: Establishes minimum level of domestic violence and sexual assault training for judges and judicial personnel.

title: Burglary of a residence-upgrades crime to second degree; mandatory parole inelig
primary_sponsors: Corrado, Kristin M.; O'Scanlon, Declan J.
summary: Upgrades burglary of a residence to a crime of the second degree; requires mandatory period of parole ineligibility if residence was occupied at time of offense.

summary: Establishes "Commission on Statewide Affordable Housing Obligations" to determine Statewide need for low and moderate income housing.

primary_sponsors: Corrado, Kristin M.; Bramnick, Jon M.
summary: Requires school buses that transport students with special needs to be equipped with certain safety features.

summary: "Mental Health Early Action on Campus Act"; requires institutions of higher education to implement mental health programs and services.

summary: Provides that institutions of higher education may permit final-year students in graduate degree programs for mental health care professions to graduate or be matched with residency or clinical programs early.

title: Mail-in ballots-move voter with undeliverable ballot to inactive file
summary: Requires commissioner of registration to move voters with undeliverable mail-in ballots to inactive file; removes such inactive voters from Statewide voter registration system following failure to vote in two consecutive federal general elections.

title: Voting fraud task force-require AG create
summary: Requires AG to create voting fraud task force.

title: Unemployment compensation-exempt poll worker wages from affecting
summary: Exempts poll workers wages from affecting unemployment compensation.*

title: Vote by Mail Study Commission-establish, report mail-in ballot irregularities
summary: Requires Secretary of State create website for voters to report irregularities regarding mail-in ballots; establishes "Vote by Mail Study Commission."

title: Office of Inspector General for Veterans' Facilities-establishes
summary: Establishes Office of Inspector General for Veterans' Facilities.

title: Voter list maintenance & crosscheck prog-estab; cert regis data in annual report
summary: Requires Secretary of State to establish voter list maintenance and crosscheck program and to include certain voter registration data in annual report to Governor and Legislature.

title: Commission on People with Disabilities-establishes
summary: Establishes "Commission on People with Disabilities."

title: Disability Life-Sustaining Measures Advisory Council-creates
primary_sponsors: Corrado, Kristin M.; Greenstein, Linda R.
summary: Creates "Disability Life-Sustaining Measures Advisory Council."

title: Special needs with motor vehicle registration-allow person to indicate
primary_sponsors: Corrado, Kristin M.; Diegnan, Patrick J.
summary: Requires MVC to allow person to indicate special needs with motor vehicle registration.

title: Disability-owned business-concerns designation for certain State programs
summary: Provides that disability-owned businesses be included in certain businesses development programs, direct loan programs, and certification processes; requires Chief Diversity Officer compile information on awarding of State contracts to disability-owned businesses.

title: Anti-choking devices, portable-require in schools
summary: Requires portable anti-choking devices be placed in schools.

title: Civil service examination-permit exemption for person with disability
summary: Permits exemption from certain civil service examinations for person with disability.

title: 9-1-1 System & Emergency Response Trust Fund-prioritizes distribution of monies
primary_sponsors: Corrado, Kristin M.; Cruz-Perez, Nilsa I.
summary: Prioritizes distribution of 9-1-1 System and Emergency Response Trust Fund monies; permits use of funds for certain expenses incurred by counties and municipalities for the provision and maintenance of 9-1-1 emergency services.

title: Parole revocation-requires for assaulting or threatening law enforcement officer
summary: Requires revocation of parole for assaulting or threatening law enforcement officers.

title: Postpartum information-establishes requirements and develop care plans
primary_sponsors: Corrado, Kristin M.; Ruiz, M. Teresa; Swain, Lisa
summary: Establishes requirements concerning provision of postpartum care, pregnancy loss, and stillbirth information and development of personalized postpartum care plans.*

title: Long-term care facilities-require to submit reports regarding residents w/disab.
summary: Requires long-term care facilities to submit reports regarding residents with disabilities.

summary: Revises requirements for health insurers to cover telemedicine and telehealth; requires telemedicine and telehealth systems to include accessible communication features for individuals with disabilities.

title: Hospital patient w/devel. disability-auth designated caregiver accompany patient
summary: Authorizes hospital patient with developmental disabilities to have designated family member, guardian, direct support professional, or other caregiver accompany patient throughout hospital stay.

title: Devel Disab, Division-align rates for self-directed empl w/max svc provider rate
summary: Requires Director of Division of Developmental Disabilities to align rates for self-directed employees with maximum service provider rates.

summary: Authorizes purchaser of automobile by private sale to operate automobile for three-day period following purchase without permanent registration or transfer of title.

title: Craft distilleries-authorizes direct shipping
summary: Authorizes direct shipping by craft distilleries.

title: Transit ADA Task Force-establishes
summary: Establishes "New Jersey Transit ADA Task Force."

title: Nursing services-establishes min. Medicaid reimbursement rates for private duty
summary: Establishes minimum Medicaid reimbursement rates for private duty nursing services.

title: Motor veh violations, cert-permit dismissal, corrects within allotted time frame
primary_sponsors: Corrado, Kristin M.; Diegnan, Patrick J.
summary: Permits dismissal of certain motor vehicle violations if defendant corrects issue within allotted time frame and provides acceptable documentation.

title: Prosecutor, county-bar from serving in acting capacity for longer than 1 year

summary: Establishes requirement that county prosecutor reside in county of appointment during term of appointment and until qualified successor is appointed.

summary: Requires 10 percent of certain federal education relief funds, approximating $26.2 million, be dedicated specifically to students with intellectual and developmental disabilities.

summary: Provides that former law enforcement officers who retired due to disability are eligible to receive tuition assistance to attend public institution of higher education or proprietary institution licensed to confer academic degrees.

title: Lyme disease-health insurance required to cover
summary: Requires health insurers to cover Lyme disease.

title: Vol firefighters, rescue & first aid squad memb-allows $5K income tax deduction
primary_sponsors: Corrado, Kristin M.; Bucco, Anthony M.
summary: Allows certain volunteer firefighters, rescue and first aid squad members to claim $5,000 income tax deduction.

title: Mil personnel killed in act of duty-prov free tuition, surviving spouse/children
summary: Provides free tuition at public institutions of higher education for surviving spouses and dependent children of military personnel killed in performance of duties.

title: Public Svc Loan Forgiveness prog-concerning the provision of information about
summary: Requires institutions of higher education and government employers to provide certain students and employees with information about Public Service Loan Forgiveness program.

summary: Requires public schools, and nonpublic schools which receive federal funding, to provide students with information on rights afforded under Title IX, and provide contact information for Title IX coordinator.

title: LGBTQ veterans-concerns benefits, update definition; DMVA develop review process
primary_sponsors: Corrado, Kristin M.; Cryan, Joseph P.

summary: Establishes Behavioral Mental Health Advisory Board in Division of Mental Health and Addiction Services in DHS.

title: Trans. mobility improvements for autism & devel disab persons-study & implement
summary: Requires DOT, NJT, and DHS to study and implement transportation mobility and accessibility improvements for persons with autism and developmental disabilities.

summary: Requires transportation network company to provide live customer service representative and certain notification to riders.

title: Unemployment claims-requires DOLWD to process within two weeks of filing
summary: Requires DOLWD to process unemployment claims within two weeks of filing.

title: Election incident reporting and complaint database-Secretary of State establish

title: MVC operations-require to provide certain services at each agency location
primary_sponsors: Corrado, Kristin M.; Bucco, Anthony M.
summary: Requires MVC to provide certain services at each MVC agency location.

title: Motor veh. accident resulting in death-req evaluation by drug recognition expert
summary: Requires driver to submit to evaluation by drug recognition expert when involved in motor vehicle accident resulting in death.

title: Vote-by-mail-permit co. clerk remove voters from lists under cert. circumstances
summary: Permits county clerk to remove voters from vote-by-mail lists under certain circumstances.

title: Voter registration records-require audit in Statewide Voter Registration System
summary: Requires Secretary of State and county commissioners of registration to perform audit of voter registration records in Statewide Voter Registration System.

title: School psychologists/counselors-req to complete mental health first aid training
summary: Requires school psychologists and school counselors to complete mental health first aid training.

title: Classic NJ license plates-authorizes issuance
summary: Authorizes issuance of classic NJ license plates.

summary: Increases degree of crime for unlawful taking of motor vehicle.

summary: Creates second degree crime for operation of stolen vehicle in manner that creates risk of injury to person or property.

title: Veterans Outdoor Recovery Task Force-require DMVA establish
summary: Requires DMVA establish Veterans Outdoor Recovery Task Force.

summary: Requires proof of ownership prior to resale of catalytic converter and upgrades theft of catalytic converter to one degree higher than underlying offense.

primary_sponsors: Corrado, Kristin M.; Schepisi, Holly T.
summary: Prohibits DOH from issuing recommendations or regulations that are more stringent than recommendations or regulations issued by federal government.

title: Mental health screening, annual-require health insurance coverage
primary_sponsors: Corrado, Kristin M.; Schepisi, Holly T.
summary: Requires health insurance coverage for annual mental health screening.

title: Election days, general and primary-requires school districts to close schools

title: Military Suicide Prevention Task Force-establishes
summary: Establishes Military Suicide Prevention Task Force.

title: Voter registration process, automatic-requires MVC to safeguard
summary: Requires MVC to safeguard automatic voter registration process.

title: Anti-choking devices, portable FDA-approved-req placement in schools
summary: Requires placement of portable FDA-approved anti-choking devices in schools.

title: Election worker compensation-exempt from taxation
summary: Exempts election worker compensation from taxation.

title: Open Public Records Act Study Commission-establishes
summary: Establishes Open Public Records Act Study Commission.

title: School bus drivers, certain-requires State to reimburse licensing costs
primary_sponsors: Corrado, Kristin M.; Diegnan, Patrick J.
summary: Requires State to reimburse licensing costs for certain school bus drivers.

primary_sponsors: Corrado, Kristin M.; Testa, Michael L.
summary: Prohibits mandatory vaccination against COVID-19 as condition of attending public K-12 schools.

title: Wi-Fi service on passenger trains-require NJT to provide
summary: Requires NJT to provide Wi-Fi service on passenger trains.

summary: Eliminates prohibition on provision of single-use paper and plastic carryout bags by grocery stores for delivery, pick-up or curbside pickup orders.

title: Transportation mobility, person w/physical disab-req DOT/NJT/DHS study/implement

title: Domestic violence-revises definition, include psychological & economic abuse

summary: Revises definition of domestic violence to include psychological abuse and economic abuse.

title: Non-College Advancement Act-establishes; makes appropriation

title: Facial recognition technology-prohibit use except for legitimate safety purpose
summary: Prohibits use of facial recognition technology on consumer except for legitimate safety purpose.

title: Emergency medical technician-streamline certification process for cert veterans
primary_sponsors: Corrado, Kristin M.; Cryan, Joseph P.
summary: Streamlines emergency medical technician certification process for certain veterans.

title: Veterans, disab-qual. for toll rate & motor vehicle registration fee exemptions
primary_sponsors: Corrado, Kristin M.; Diegnan, Patrick J.
summary: Qualifies certain disabled veterans for toll rate exemptions and exemptions from motor vehicle registration fees.

summary: Requires MVC and AAA to contract to allow for provision of certain motor vehicle services at AAA facilities.

summary: Codifies and revises background check and other requirements for certain individuals working with children.

title: State Government and Civil Service Student Internship Program-establish;$750K

summary: Allows candidates for Senate and General Assembly to appear together in same nominating petition.

summary: Requires biennial inspection of nursing homes and assisted living facilities.

summary: Increases cap on grants for farmland stewardship activities to $100,000 per application.

title: Green infrastructure financing program-establish; make accessible and affordable
summary: Establishes green infrastructure financing program.

title: Water loss audits-require water purveyors to conduct and report to DEP
summary: Requires water purveyors to conduct, and report to DEP, water loss audits.

summary: Establishes permanent unit in Office of Emergency Management to address access and functional needs of residents related to disasters and emergencies.

title: Induction loop listening system-install in new constr. bldgs. open to the public
summary: Requires induction loop listening system installation in certain buildings open to public upon new construction or substantial renovation.

summary: Provides for DCA to reestablish and administer certification program for recreation administrators and automatically reinstate administrator certifications issued under prior law.

title: Small Business Indoor Air Quality Management Support Prog-establishes
primary_sponsors: Greenstein, Linda R.; Testa, Michael L.
summary: Establishes "New Jersey Small Business Indoor Air Quality Management Support Program."

title: Household Water Assistance Program-establishes;$75M
summary: Establishes "Household Water Assistance Program"; appropriates $75 million.

summary: Establishes grant program in DEP to provide financial assistance to municipalities for infrastructure and other physical upgrades to certain municipally owned sanitary landfill facilities closed before June 1987; appropriates $10 million.

summary: Provides for establishment of New Jersey Water Infrastructure Center at institute of higher education designated by DEP; appropriates $5 million.

title: Motor vehicle registration-req. MVC place notation indicating registrant is deaf
summary: Requires MVC to place designation on motor vehicle's registration information indicating registrant is deaf or hard of hearing.*

summary: Requires municipalities to designate parking spaces for disabled veterans and Purple Heart recipients.

summary: Directs DEP to develop State water infrastructure investment plan; requires NJ Infrastructure Bank to publish additional information about water infrastructure projects; appropriates $200,000 to NJ Infrastructure Bank.

title: Mental health and addiction service provider-transition to fee-for-svc reimb sys
summary: Supplemental appropriation of $25 million to DOH to assist certain mental health and addiction service providers transitioning to fee-for-service reimbursement system.

title: False pub alarm-upgrade crime, resulting in police response against cert persons
summary: Upgrades crime of false public alarm when act done knowing it will result in law enforcement response against certain persons.

title: Price discrimination-prohibits gender-based
summary: Prohibits gender-based price discrimination.

title: Apprenticeship training-provide secondary classroom experience credit
summary: Provides secondary classroom experience credit towards meeting requirements of classroom training portion of registered apprenticeship.

title: Victims of domestic violence, sexual assault or stalking-prov. rental/lease prot
summary: Provides rental and lease protections for victims of domestic violence, sexual assault, or stalking.

summary: "New Jersey Pharmacy Audit Bill of Rights;" establishes procedures by which entities are required to conduct audits of pharmacies.

title: Bisphenol A-prohibits use of receipt paper containing
summary: Prohibits use of receipt paper containing bisphenol A.

title: Condominium associations-prohibits assessing insurance deductibles to unit owner
summary: Prohibits condominium associations from assessing insurance deductibles to individual unit owners or groups of unit owners.

title: Water testing and filters-water supplier reimburse residential customers
summary: Requires water suppliers to reimburse residential customers for drinking water testing under certain circumstances.

title: Water Data Center-establishes at public institution of higher education;$1M
summary: Establishes NJ Water Data Center at public institution of higher education; appropriates $1 million.

title: State agency websites-make accessible to people w/disabilities on mobile devices

title: Victim of sexual assault-establish right to notify developments in criminal case

summary: Establishes right of sexual assault victim to notification of certain developments in criminal case.

title: Filing false report against law enforcement officers-establish crime

title: Disab. persons-establish program to connect with job training & employment
summary: Establishes program in DOLWD to connect persons with disabilities with job training and employment.

title: Pharmacy benefits manager-prohibit requiring covered persons to use mail service

title: MVC online transactions-require to operate hotline to assist with

title: Honorably discharged veterans-establishes special license plate

summary: Requires DOT to prioritize green stormwater infrastructure in design, construction, reconstruction, and repair of public highways.

title: Prisoner reentry peer support hotline-establishes
summary: Establishes prisoner reentry peer support hotline.

title: Senior citizen housing proj-landlord prov written explanation for rent increase
summary: Requires landlord to provide written explanation for rent increase on tenant of senior citizen housing project.

summary: Requires DCA to establish procedures for inspection and abatement of mold hazards in residential buildings and school facilities, and certification programs for mold inspectors and mold hazard abatement workers.

title: Accidental death benefit-increases for certain members of PERS

title: Home, single-family-estab req if purch & reselling within 1 yr of occupancy cert
summary: Establishes certain requirements if purchasing and reselling same single-family home within one year of receiving certificate of occupancy.

title: Brewery license holder, limited & restricted-estab & codifies certain privileges

title: Private detectives-require to register their foreign employers with State Police
summary: Requires private detectives to register their foreign employers with State Police.

title: Health information, personal-prohibit acquisition or disclosure without consent
summary: Prohibits acquisition or disclosure of personal health information without consent.

title: Homestead and bank account exemptions-establishes for person in debt

title: Property tax assessment-revises calendar
summary: Revises property tax assessment calendar.

title: Wage and hour law-increases certain penalties for violations
summary: Increases certain penalties for violations of wage and hour law.

summary: Requires notification of local law enforcement prior to expungement of certain mental health records of prospective firearms purchasers.

title: Disability law and etiquette-requires training for State employees
summary: Requires State employees to be trained in disability law and etiquette.

title: Anti-nepotism policies-req. adoption of policies by school dist. and charter sch
summary: Requires adoption of anti-nepotism policies by school districts and charter schools.

title: Coast Guard-authorize special license plates for members

summary: Authorizes special license plates for members of the United States Coast Guard.

title: Student athlete physical examinations-requires insurance cover

title: Income tax agreements, reciprocal w/other states-restricts auth. to terminate
summary: Restricts authority to terminate reciprocal personal income tax agreements with other states.
