title: Homestead property tax reimbursement-revises criteria to establish base year
primary_sponsors: Moriarty, Paul D.; Amato, Carmen F.
summary: Revises criteria to establish base year for homestead property tax reimbursement after relocation.

title: County police department and force-provide police services to municipalities
summary: Permits county police department and force to provide police services to municipalities.

title: Omnibus driver-inspect bus at end of route for passengers w/disabilities
summary: Requires omnibus drivers to inspect bus at end of route for passengers with disabilities.

title: Crime victim's info.-proh disclosure pertaining to assault on health care worker
summary: Prohibits disclosure of personal information pertaining to certain health care workers who are victims of assault; establishes civil penalty for each violation.

title: Sex trafficking & domestic violence victims-specifies additional services;$1M
summary: Specifies additional services for victims of sex trafficking and domestic violence; makes $1,000,000 appropriation.

title: Prof & occupational licenses-req issuance of report on processing of application
summary: Requires issuance of report on certain information and data on processing of applications for professional and occupational licenses and mandates review of training and call intake in Division of Consumer Affairs.

title: Mail-in ballot, accessible-requires availability for voters with disabilities
summary: Requires availability of accessible mail-in ballot for voters with disabilities.

title: Home instruction-provide documentation to school district of need
primary_sponsors: Moriarty, Paul D.; McKnight, Angela V.
summary: Clarifies which health care professional may provide documentation to school district of need for home instruction due to student's health condition.*

title: Early childhood mental health-disseminate guidelines to certain professionals
summary: Requires DCF to publish and disseminate information on early childhood mental health to certain professionals.

title: Merchandise offered in advertisements-req. disclosure of usual/customary price
summary: Requires disclosure of usual and customary price for merchandise offered in certain advertisements.

title: Events canceled due to coronavirus-req. refunds & caps additional venue charges
summary: Requires refunds for payments made to venues for events canceled due to coronavirus disease 2019 pandemic and caps additional venue charges at no more than rate of inflation for rescheduled events.

title: Paper account statements-depository institutions req. to provide to elder adults
summary: Requires depository institutions to provide paper account statements to elder adults.

title: Transportation services-certain providers develop and publish route schedules
primary_sponsors: McKnight, Angela V.; Turner, Shirley K.
summary: Requires certain providers of transportation services to develop and publish route schedules.

title: Senior citizen high-rise building-lobby security req in high violent crime areas
summary: Requires lobby security for certain senior citizen high-rise buildings in areas with high violent crime rates.

title: Witness protective order-authorize against actor attempted to prevent reporting
summary: Authorizes protective order for certain witnesses or victims against actor who attempted to prevent or obstruct them from reporting crime to police.

title: American Sign Language interpreter-request interpreter at public meetings
summary: Requires public bodies upon request to provide American Sign Language interpreter at public meetings.

title: 911 calls, certain-establishes procedures for intake and record keeping
summary: Establishes procedures for intake and record keeping of certain 9-1-1 calls.

title: Law enforcement officer-required to have updated photograph
summary: Requires law enforcement officers to have updated photograph.

title: Child counseling-either physically present or heard acts of domestic violence
summary: Concerns counseling for children who were either physically present or who may have seen or heard act of domestic violence.

title: Safe Sanitary Subsidized Rental Housing Bill of Rights-establishes
summary: Establishes the "Safe Sanitary Subsidized Rental Housing Bill of Rights."

title: Landlord registration procedures-clarifies & expands; create rights for tenants
summary: Clarifies and expands landlord registration procedures; creates certain rights for tenants; makes certain changes concerning tenant notifications, inspections, and maintenance in multiple dwellings; permits percentage of affordable housing obligation to be satisfied by certain rehabilitation projects.

title: Gunfire-sch-based mentoring in pub schools located w/in 1K feet, 3 yr pilot prog
summary: Establishes three-year pilot program for school-based mentoring in public schools located within 1,000 feet of gunfire.

title: State aid, public schools-provides voluntary contrib by taxpayers on tax returns
summary: Provides for voluntary contributions by taxpayers on gross income tax returns to State aid for public schools.

title: College Loans to Assist State Students-defer payments to new parent
summary: Directs Higher Education Student Assistance Authority to grant deferment of New Jersey College Loans to Assist State Students (NJCLASS) student loan payments to new parent.

title: School dress code or uniform policy-prohibit school dist from denying admittance
primary_sponsors: McKnight, Angela V.; Turner, Shirley K.
summary: Prohibits school district from denying admittance to student due to tardiness or violation of dress code or school uniform policy.

title: Hate crimes-amend statute that crim. display of symbols/exposing threats of viol
summary: Amends statute that criminalizes display of symbols, objects, or graffiti exposing another to threats of violence to specifically include noose, burning cross, or other symbol of hate.

title: Bereavement areas-certain hospitals required to establish
summary: Requires certain hospitals to establish bereavement areas.

title: Cursive handwriting in public schools-requires instruction
primary_sponsors: McKnight, Angela V.; Turner, Shirley K.; Reynolds-Jackson, Verlina
summary: Requires instruction on cursive handwriting in public school curriculum for grades three through five.*

title: School counselor certification-estab certain program req; outline role & duties
primary_sponsors: McKnight, Angela V.; Turner, Shirley K.
summary: Establishes certain program requirements for school counselor certification; outlines role and duties of school counselor; requires professional development for school counselors; establishes position of School Counselor Liaison in DOE.

title: Real estate appraisal-revoke/suspend/fine co, engage in discriminatory appraisal
summary: Permits State Real Estate Appraiser Board to revoke, suspend, or fine appraisers or appraisal management companies who knowingly engage in discriminatory appraisals of residential property on basis of race or national origin.

title: Municipal Community Center Grant Program-establishes
primary_sponsors: McKnight, Angela V.; Turner, Shirley K.
summary: Establishes "Municipal Community Center Grant Program."

title: Senior citizen assistance program, mobile-require DOH develop
summary: Requires DOH to develop mobile senior citizen assistance program.

title: Individuals formerly in foster care-provide comprehensive Medicaid benefits
summary: Provides comprehensive Medicaid benefits to certain individuals formerly in foster care.

title: Law enforce off, participate in hate groups-estab internal affair review council
summary: Requires law enforcement agencies to establish review council in internal affairs unit to investigate law enforcement officers who participate in hate groups.

title: Police officers, licensing-require Police Training Comm. adopt uniform standards
summary: Requires Police Training Commission to adopt uniform standards for licensing police officers.

title: Domestic extremist organization database-require AG establish and maintain
summary: Requires Attorney General to establish and maintain domestic extremist organization database.

title: Inmate commutation credits-proh. forfeiture for minor disciplinary infractions
summary: Prohibits forfeiture of inmate's commutation credits for minor disciplinary infractions and expands inmate's ability to restore certain forfeited credits.

title: Health club contracts-requires provisions, regarding infectious disease outbreak
summary: Requires health club services contract contain certain provisions regarding procedures during outbreak of infectious disease.

title: Law enforcement officers-req. periodically vetted for evidence of personal bias
summary: Requires certain law enforcement officers be periodically vetted for evidence of personal bias.

title: Virtual/remote instruction implementation-req primarily through virtual sessions
summary: Requires school programs of virtual or remote instruction to be implemented primarily through use of virtual instructional sessions.

title: Home-schooled child-parent req to notify school district in writing of intention
summary: Requires parent or guardian to annually notify school district in writing of intention to home-school child; requires school district to compile and post on district website number of home-schooled children.

title: Transporting network companies-proh engaging in surge pricing during st of emerg
primary_sponsors: McKnight, Angela V.; Turner, Shirley K.
summary: Prohibits transportation network companies from engaging in surge pricing during state of emergency.

title: Physicians-requires implicit bias training
summary: Requires implicit bias training for physicians.

title: Homeschooling expenses, certain-provides gross income tax credit
summary: Provides gross income tax credit for certain homeschooling expenses.

title: Dry drowning-municipalities req to provide information at public swimming pools
summary: Requires municipalities that have public swimming pools to provide information regarding "dry drowning."

title: Prostitution Offender Education Prog.-impose mandatory fine w/in 500 feet of sch
summary: Imposes mandatory fine and education requirement for certain prostitution offenses committed within 500 feet of a school, registered day care or licensed child care facility property; creates fund.

title: Public utility-concerns reports on capital investments, response to incr. rates
summary: Requires BPU to post on its website report from public utility on public utility's capital investments in response to petition from public utility to increase rates.

title: Urban Wealth Fund Pilot Program-establishes
summary: Establishes the "Urban Wealth Fund Pilot Program."

title: Law enforcement position-require cert background investigation for candidate
summary: Requires certain background investigation for candidate for law enforcement position.

title: Electric pub utility svc outage-concerns reimbursment for spoiled food/medicine
summary: Requires electric public utility to reimburse customers for up to $500 for spoiled food and full cost of spoiled medicine resulting from lengthy service outage following major event.

title: Implicit bias & cultural competency training-req social svc workers complete
summary: Requires State, county, and municipal social service workers to periodically complete implicit bias and cultural competency training.

title: Division on Violence Prevention & Intervention-establishes in DLPS
summary: Establishes a Division on Violence Prevention and Intervention in the DLPS.

title: Pandemic Risk Reinsurance Program-establish; concerns business interruption
summary: Establishes New Jersey Pandemic Risk Reinsurance Program.

title: Community Learning Program-estab.; provide comprehensive after school programs
summary: Establishes New Jersey Community Learning Program in DOE to provide comprehensive after school programs in certain communities; dedicates portion of State cannabis revenue to support program.

title: Barbering-create new level of license & apprenticeships; estab. instruct. limits
summary: Creates new level of barbering license and apprenticeships in barbering, and establishes limits to hours of instruction for certain barbering training.

title: Nursing assistants, certified-estab. program for certain individuals to become
summary: Establishes program for certain individuals to become certified homemaker-home health aides and provide services to certain Medicaid and Medicaid-Medicare dually eligible enrollees under increased reimbursement rates.

title: Specific learning disabilities-estab. req. concerning identification of students
primary_sponsors: McKnight, Angela V.; Turner, Shirley K.
summary: Establishes requirements concerning methods for determining whether student has specific learning disability under federal Individuals with Disabilities Education Act.*

title: Nursing homes-provide training to staff in behavioral health issues
primary_sponsors: McKnight, Angela V.; Burgess, Renee C.
summary: Requires nursing homes to provide training to staff in behavioral health issues.

title: Maria's Law-homemaker-home health aides, requires certification suspension
summary: Requires suspension of certification of homemaker-home health aides under certain circumstances.*

title: Coordination Among Nonprofit Social Service Organizations-establish Task Force
summary: Establishes NJ Task Force on Coordination Among Nonprofit Social Service Organizations.

title: Children's Health Promotion Fund-establishes
summary: Establishes Children's Health Promotion Fund.

title: Medicaid applications, incomplete-revises procedures for processing
summary: Revises procedures for processing incomplete Medicaid applications; exempts asset transfers of up to $500 per month during look back period for determining eligibility for long-term care services.

title: Medicaid Managed Care Org. Oversight Program-estab. for availability and access
summary: Establishes Medicaid Managed Care Organization Oversight Program.

title: Restaurants & diabetes-require to provide alternative menu
summary: Requires restaurants to provide alternative menu for individuals with diabetes.

title: Insulin-req DOH maintain emergency stockpile & authorize dispensing emerg supply
summary: Requires DOH to maintain emergency stockpile of insulin and authorizes dispensing of emergency supply of insulin to certain patients.

title: Student Learning Standards-evaluate historical events for inclusion
summary: Requires State Board of Education to evaluate historical events for inclusion in New Jersey Student Learning Standards.

title: Myeloma screening-require performance under certain circumstances
summary: Requires performance of myeloma screening under certain circumstances.

title: Long-term care facilities, certain-imposes minimum staffing req. & reporting req
summary: Imposes minimum staffing requirements and certain reporting requirements on certain long-term care facilities.

title: Geriatric social workers-req St Long-Term Care Ombudsman to employ 3 to serve NJ
summary: Requires State Long-Term Care Ombudsman to employ three geriatric social workers to serve New Jersey's long-term care residents and makes appropriation.

title: Long-term care facilities-develop person-centered care plans for residents
summary: Requires long-term care facilities to develop person-centered care plans for residents and establishes right to certain forms of visitation for long-term care residents.

title: Medicaid-require coverage of social day care services for senior citizens
summary: Requires Medicaid coverage of social day care services for senior citizens.

title: Guardianship-req court consider cert factors in appointing & justify on record
summary: Requires court to consider certain factors in appointing guardian and to justify guardianship appointment on record.

title: Guardians, professional-revise visitation and reporting rules
summary: Revises visitation and reporting rules for professional guardians.

title: Guardianship letters, incapacitated person-allow court to consider previous care
summary: Allows court to consider previous care when granting letters of guardianship for incapacitated person.

title: Automotive Anti-Theft Systems Task Force-establish
summary: Establishes "Automotive Anti-Theft Systems Task Force."

title: Nursing home health, safety, and operations-revises requirements for assessing
summary: Revises requirements for assessing nursing home health, safety, and operations and for taking action against low-performing nursing homes.

title: Graduate Physician Licensing Act-establishes
summary: Establishes "Graduate Physician Licensing Act."

title: Construction projects, certain-requires air monitoring
summary: Requires air monitoring at certain construction projects.

title: Highlands preservation area-allows for exclusion of certain properties
summary: Allows for exclusion of certain properties from Highlands preservation area.

title: Pension and Health Benefits Review Commission-expands scope of review
summary: Expands scope of review of Pension and Health Benefits Review Commission.

title: Street rods and custom motor vehicles-establish motor vehicle registration
summary: Establishes motor vehicle registration for street rods and custom motor vehicles.

title: PERS-requires eligibility checklist and audit for enrollment
summary: Requires eligibility checklist and audit for enrollment in PERS of certain public employees who provide professional services; imposes fine on certifying officer or supervisor for ineligible enrollments.

title: DEP lands for fishing, hunting and trapping purposes-provide for no net loss
summary: Provides for no net loss of DEP lands for fishing, hunting, and trapping purposes.

title: Freshwater fishing/hunting/trapping-Fish/Game Council sole authority to regulate
summary: Clarifies that Fish and Game Council has sole authority to regulate freshwater fishing, hunting, and trapping.

title: Alcoholic Beverage Tax rate-decrease on certain liquors
summary: Decreases Alcoholic Beverage Tax rate paid on certain liquors.

title: School district's budget proposal-restricts Ed. Commissioner authority to reject
summary: Restricts Commissioner of Education's authority to reject school district's budget proposal.

title: Milk dealer license application-Agriculture Department prov electronic submittal
summary: Requires Dept. of Agriculture to provide for electronic submittal of milk dealer license applications.

title: Fire & EMS Crisis Intervention Services-establishes telephone hotline
summary: Establishes "New Jersey Fire and EMS Crisis Intervention Services" telephone hotline.

title: Affordable housing rules-exempts contaminated and industrially-zoned sites
summary: Exempts contaminated and industrially-zoned sites from affordable housing rules.

title: Sch dist, Type II-hold Nov sch election to receive voter approval of base budget
summary: Requires Type II school district without board of school estimate holding its school election in November to receive voter approval of base budget.

title: Motor vehicle registration fees-exempts public higher education institutions
summary: Exempts public institutions of higher education from motor vehicle registration fee.

title: Jobs Protection Act-verification of employment required

title: Highlands Water Prot. Council-4 of the 7 memb. cannot be of the same pol. Party
summary: Provides that no more than four of the seven public members appointed to the Highlands Water Protection and Planning Council may be of the same political party.

title: COVID-19 response in NJ-establish bipartisan task force to study
summary: Establishes bipartisan task force to study response to COVID-19 in New Jersey.

title: Admin. Procedure Act-concerns socio-economic impact statements for rule-making
summary: Revises "Administrative Procedure Act" concerning socio-economic impact statements for proposed rule-making.

title: Manufacturing facilities-proh. 10 yrs. applicability of new State & local rules
summary: Prohibits for 10 years applicability of new State and local rules and regulations to certain manufacturing facilities.

title: Apprenticeships and programs-provides dedicated funding for promotion
summary: Provides dedicated funding for promotion of apprenticeships and apprenticeship programs from Workforce Development Partnership Fund.

title: Emerg. mgmt. depts-expands authority requesting asst outside normal jurisdiction
summary: Expands authority of emergency management departments in requesting assistance outside normal territorial jurisdictions.

title: Epinephrine auto-injector device-permit correction/firefighter/police administer
summary: Permits corrections officers, firefighters, and police officers to administer epinephrine auto-injector device.

title: Electric public utilities-establish toll-free number, report damaged equipment
summary: Requires electric public utilities to establish toll-free telephone number to be used by public for reporting damaged equipment and dangerous vegetation.

title: Motorcycles-authorizes creation of vertical license plates
summary: Authorizes creation of vertical motorcycle license plates.

title: Rooming and boarding house-revises definition of landlord to include
summary: Revises definition of "landlord" to include rooming and boarding house owners and operators with regard to ordinances holding landlords to certain standards of responsibility.

title: Deer-authorizes Sunday firearm and bow hunting on certain lands
summary: Authorizes Sunday firearm and bow hunting for deer on certain lands.

summary: Requires clinic connected with dental school at public institution of higher education to give priority to 100 percent disabled veterans.

title: Core curriculum content standard and Statewide assessment-leg. approval req.
summary: Requires legislative approval of changes to core curriculum content standards and Statewide assessments.

title: Agricultural or horticultural land and woodlands-ban foreign ownership
summary: Bans foreign ownership of agricultural or horticultural land and agricultural woodlands in State.

title: Technology-prohibit State contracts with Chinese government-owned companies
summary: Prohibits State contracts for technology with Chinese government-owned or affiliated companies.

title: Election admin expenses-proh use of private funds; estab crime/penal, violations
summary: Prohibits use of private funds and personnel in governmental offices and procedures pertaining to administration of elections; establishes crimes and penalties for violations.

title: Firearm-related background check, cert-concerns; domestic viol restraining order
summary: Establishes priority for certain firearm-related background checks when applicant has obtained domestic violence restraining order.

title: Baby products, certain-exempts sales from sales and use tax
summary: Exempts sales of certain baby products from sales and use tax.

title: Firearms & ammunitions-concerns credit card companies for purchases
summary: Prohibits use of new merchant category code by credit card companies for purchases of firearms and ammunitions.

title: Second Amendment license plates-authorizes creation
summary: Authorizes creation of Second Amendment license plates.

title: Firearm ID cards-allows county sheriffs to issue & permits to purchase handguns
summary: Allows county sheriffs to issue firearms identification cards and permits to purchase handguns; authorizes county sheriffs to accept applications for permits to carry handguns.

title: Cemetery companies-estab minimum dollar amount required in Maintenance/Preserv
summary: Establishes minimum dollar amount required in Maintenance and Preservation Funds of cemetery companies established before December 1, 1971.

summary: Suspends "Highlands Water Protection and Planning Act" until certain conditions are met.

summary: Provides "Highlands Water Protection and Planning Act" exemption, and clarifies municipal planning or zoning authority, for certain development along commercial corridors in Highlands Region.

title: Farm to Public Institution of Higher Education Program-establish
summary: Establishes "New Jersey Farm to Public Institution of Higher Education Program."

title: Right to Home Defense Law-justifiable use of force, defending home or residence
summary: The "New Jersey Right to Home Defense Law."

title: Appointment of challengers-allow to any election dist, where challenger resides
summary: Allows appointment of challengers to any election district within congressional or legislative district where challenger resides.

title: Mail-in ballot-prohibit outer envelope from containing political affiliation
summary: Prohibits mail-in ballot outer envelope from containing political affiliation or designation visible to public.

title: Mail-in ballot-complete ballot each year; repeals automatic vote-by-mail desig.
summary: Requires voter who wishes to vote by mail to complete application for mail-in ballot each calendar year; repeals automatic vote-by-mail designation.

title: Division of Elections-transfer to Department of Law & Public Safety
summary: Transfers Division of Elections from Department of State to Department of Law and Public Safety; designates Attorney General as chief election official and requires two bipartisan co-directors.

title: Value-added Ag Loan Prog-estab, assist farmers in developing value-added product
summary: Requires NJEDA to establish "Value-added Agriculture Loan Program" to assist farmers in developing value-added products.

title: Human Trafficking, Comm-expands function, promote coordinated response
summary: Expands function of Commission on Human Trafficking to include promoting coordinated response by law enforcement to human trafficking.

title: Farmers, beginning-NJEDA estab loan program to assist in finan capital purchases
summary: Requires NJEDA to establish loan program to assist beginning farmers in financing capital purchases.

title: Turnpike Authority-provide for representation of certain regions
summary: Provides for representation of certain regions of State on New Jersey Turnpike Authority.

title: Illegal aliens-excludes from workers' compensation and temporary disab. benefits
primary_sponsors: Amato, Carmen F.; Steinhardt, Douglas J.
summary: Excludes certain illegal aliens from workers' compensation and temporary disability benefits.

title: Military service-auth. free hunting/fishing lic & free admission to St. parks
summary: Authorizes free hunting, fishing, and trapping licenses and free admission to State parks and forests for individuals with certain types of military service.

title: Veterans' benefits-broadens elig. by eliminating req of serving during cert wars
summary: Broadens eligibility for certain veterans' benefits by eliminating requirement of service during specified dates or in specified locations.

title: Aliens, authorized-certification req persons receiving State money or privileges
primary_sponsors: Amato, Carmen F.; Steinhardt, Douglas J.
summary: Requires certification that persons directly or indirectly receiving State monies or privileges are not unauthorized aliens.

title: Financial exploitation of the elderly-creates offense
summary: Creates offense of financial exploitation of the elderly.

title: Senior citizen or veteran identity theft-increase penalties
primary_sponsors: Amato, Carmen F.; Sarlo, Paul A.
summary: Increases penalties for identity theft when victim is a senior citizen or veteran.

title: Dredging account, special-establish, DEP administer account and programs
summary: Establishes special dredging account; directs $5,000,000 of sales tax collected annually be deposited therein; directs DEP to administer account and dredging program with certain requirements.

title: Dredged material disposal projects, navigational waterways;$26.14M
summary: Appropriates $26,140,000 for dredging projects and dredged material disposal projects related to navigational waterways.

title: Veterans-municipal development trust funds be spent on affordable assistance
summary: Permits certain portion of municipal development trust funds to be spent on housing affordability assistance to veterans.

title: Dredging waterways, certain-DEP assume responsibility & provide boat access
summary: Requires DEP to assume responsibility for dredging of waterways providing boat access to lagoon communities; appropriates $6,000,000.

title: Transfer Inheritance Tax-eliminates and repeals parts of the revised statute
summary: Eliminates the New Jersey Transfer Inheritance Tax and repeals parts of chapters 33 through 37 of Title 54 of the Revised Statutes.

title: Immunity for youth sports leagues & senior planned real estate devel assoc-estab
summary: Establishes immunity for youth sports leagues and senior planned real estate development associations relating to COVID-19.

title: Beach fees-municipalities charge reduced or no fee, children ages 12 to 17
summary: Permits municipalities to charge reduced or no beach fee for children ages 12 to 17; revises law concerning beach fees for veterans.

title: Dredging control reserve fund-authorizes municipalities to establish
summary: Authorizes municipalities to establish dredging control reserve fund.

title: PFRS-requires all law enforcement officers to be enrolled in
summary: Allows law enforcement officers in PERS to transfer to and enroll in PFRS; requires all law enforcement officers to be enrolled in PFRS.

title: Public fds, stolen-levied against convicted employees retirement pension contrib
summary: Allows judgment for restitution of stolen public funds to be levied against convicted employee's retirement allowance or pension contributions.

title: Home improvement contract-civil actions, brought in county where prop is located
summary: Provides that civil actions concerning home improvement contracts for residential or non-commercial property may be brought in the county where the property is located.

title: Sexual assault, brutal-impose mandatory term of life imprisonment w/out parole
summary: Imposes mandatory term of life imprisonment without eligibility for parole on persons who commit particularly brutal sexual assaults.

title: Greenhead fly population-authorizes counties to reduce;$50K
primary_sponsors: Amato, Carmen F.; Stack, Brian P.
summary: Authorizes counties to reduce greenhead fly populations; appropriates $50,000.

title: Pub officers/employees-convicted of cert crimes, subject to pension garnishment
summary: Makes public officers or employees convicted of certain crimes or found at fault in certain civil actions liable and subject to pension garnishment for public legal expenses and illegally obtained funds.

title: Dredging lagoon community waterways-authorizes assessment/bonds to finance
summary: Authorizes municipal dredging of lagoon community waterways and levying of special assessment or issuing of bonds to finance such dredging.

title: Wharves, piers repair-auth. municipalities to adopt ordinances req. maintenance
summary: Authorizes municipalities to adopt ordinances requiring maintenance and repair of certain wharves, piers, docks and bulkheads.

title: Defense of Community Standards Act-revises law concerning sexually oriented bus.
summary: Revises law concerning sexually oriented businesses.

title: Fish & game law viol-provide for payment to small mun, penalty money assessed
summary: Provides for payment to small municipalities, in certain cases, of certain penalty moneys assessed for violations of fish and game laws.

title: Trapping license fees-provides discount for resident senior citizens
summary: Provides for discounted resident trapping license fees for senior citizens.

title: 100% Disabled Veteran-authorizes license plate for qualified veterans

summary: Authorizes "100 percent Disabled Veteran" license plates for qualified veterans; entitles holders to handicapped parking privileges.

title: Burlington-Ocean Purple Heart Memorial Highway-designates State Highway Route 72
summary: Designates State Highway Route 72 as "Burlington-Ocean Purple Heart Memorial Highway."

title: Photovoltaic technologies, age-restricted community clubhouse fac.-BPU prov. fd.

title: Internet Predator Investigation and Prosecution Fund-establish w/$200 assessment
summary: Establishes "Internet Predator Investigation and Prosecution Fund" with $200 assessment on persons convicted of certain offenses.

title: Drunk driving offenses-criminalizes fifth or subsequent
summary: Criminalizes fifth or subsequent drunk driving offenses.

title: Amber Alert system-requires additional fines for certain crimes against minors
summary: Requires additional fines for certain crimes against minors to fund Amber Alert system.

title: DUI suspended license-increase prison time for convicted motor vehicle offense
summary: Increases prison time for certain persons convicted of a motor vehicle offense when license suspended for DUI.

title: MVC database-allows persons w/autism voluntarily enter med. info. on drivers lic

title: Vulnerable person-creates new offense of theft by financial exploitation
summary: Creates new offense of theft by financial exploitation of a vulnerable person.

title: Heroin offenses-increases penalties by revising threshold amounts

title: Pub. entity or emp, acting w/in scope of employment-punitive damages not awarded
summary: Clarifies that punitive damages may not be awarded against public entities or public employees acting within the scope of their employment in any action.

title: Senior citizen supplemental stabilization aid-reestablish
summary: Reestablishes senior citizen supplemental stabilization aid.

title: Surviving spouse, cert blind or disabled vet-annual comp paid from date of death
summary: Makes annual compensation paid to surviving spouses of certain blind or disabled veterans payable from date of veteran's death.

title: Breann's Law-children w/catastrophic illnesses provide out of network coverage

title: Intoxicated employees-prevented from receiving worker's compensation
summary: Prevents intoxicated employees from receiving workers' compensation.

title: Sales receipts-requires account number to be truncated
summary: Requires account numbers to be truncated on certain sales receipts.

title: Motor vehicle manufacturer rebates-excl. value from sales price under sales tax
summary: Excludes value of certain manufacturer rebates from sales price of motor vehicles taxable under sales and use tax.

title: Energy tax revenue-caps St use portion, ensures balance paid annually as mun aid

title: Veteran's gross income tax exemption-extends to deceased veteran spouses

title: Vaccinations-urge State citizens to stay up-to-date
summary: Urges State citizens to stay up-to-date on vaccinations.

title: Taxpayer information-condemns federal government's actions, undermining privacy
